events.desc: Documentary series offering high-impact investigations and in-depth reporting from our award winning World Service team across the globe.

events.title: Monster Makes with Rebecca
events.desc: Monster Makes is a burst of creativity for pre-schoolers hosted by CBeebies favourite Rebecca Keatley and the lovable Murphi, a funny and furry monster with a penchant for inventive creations. Murphi's simple ethos, that anyone can make something brilliant with a bit of monster magic, is at the heart of each episode and encourages recycling and creativity.

events.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next?
events.desc: Property experts catch up with house-hunters who bought their perfect place abroad and get a glimpse of what their lives are like living in the sun

events.title: Shed and Buried
events.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove hit the road to find, buy and profit from the UK's abandoned automtive gems. All over the country there are classic and unusual vehicles waiting to be discovered.

events.title: Ronan Keating's Wild Atlantic
events.desc: Ronan's coming home - to one of the world's most magical and healing places. There's laughter and tears along the way as he makes a heartfelt return to Ireland's west coast.

events.title: Made in Chelsea
events.desc: Cette série de téléréalité suit les vies et les amours d'un groupe de jeunes de la haute société qui vivent dans l'un des quartiers les plus huppés de Londres.

events.title: Junk and Disorderly
events.desc: Vintage restorers Henry Cole and his mechanical genius of a best mate Sam Lovegrove are back on the memorabilia merry-go-round, challenging themselves to make money out of buying and selling other people's automotive junk and classic collectibles.

trailers.label: Junk & Disorderly | Brand New Series | ITV4

events.title: Secret Sex Lives of Tyrants
events.desc: Archival footage and expert analysis provide insights into the private lives of history's most notorious dictators. We also examine the consequences that arise when private behaviour and public power collide.

events.title: Four Corners
events.desc:
Four Corners is Australia's longest-running investigative journalism/current affairs television program. Broadcast on ABC1 in Australia, it premiered on 19 August 1961 and celebrated its 60th anniversary in 2021. Founding producer Robert Raymond and his successor Allan Ashbolt did much to set the ongoing tone of the program.

Based on the Panorama concept, the program addresses a single issue in depth each week, showing either a locally produced program or a relevant documentary from overseas. The program has won many awards for investigative journalism, and broken many high-profile stories. A notable early example of this was the show's epoch-making 1962 exposé on the appalling living conditions endured by many Aboriginal Australians living in rural New South Wales.

trailers.label: Four Corners show openers 1961 - 2021 | Sixty years of Australia's longest-running TV series

events.title: Kunnen we overeenkomen?
events.desc: Let's be honest: where people live together, annoyances arise. Whether it concerns pruning hedges, noise pollution from crowing roosters or discussions about plot boundaries. Britt Van Marsenille and Deputy Justice of the Peace Dieter Vanoutrive want to tackle these annoyances in the new Can we agree? They encourage people to talk to each other before going to court. Because the peace courts are overcrowded, the waiting lists are long and proceedings can become expensive. With more than twenty years of experience as a deputy justice of the peace, Dieter Vanoutrive also noted that many people have never spoken to each other before turning to a justice of the peace.

events.title: Still Standing
events.desc: Judy et Bill se sont connus au secondaire (lycée en France) dans les années 1970, à une époque où la liberté et l'ouverture d'esprit prévalaient. Devenus parents, ils ont choisi une éducation anti-conformiste pour leurs enfants, désirant être autant une mère ou un père qu'un copain. Mais l'adolescence est un âge difficile et leur fille, Lauren, le leur fait sentir. Et il est toujours aussi dur de décoller leur fils Brian de son écran d'ordinateur. Heureusement, Tina, la petite dernière, ne montre pas encore de signes de rébellion...

events.title: 22 Minutes
events.desc: This Hour Has 22 Minutes is a weekly Canadian television comedy that airs on CBC Television. Launched in 1993 during Canada's 35th general election, the show focuses on Canadian politics, combining news parody, sketch comedy and satirical editorials. Originally featuring Cathy Jones, Rick Mercer, Greg Thomey and Mary Walsh, the series featured satirical sketches of the weekly news and Canadian political events. The show's format is a mock news program, intercut with comic sketches, parody commercials and humorous interviews of public figures. The on-location segments are frequently filmed with slanted camera angles.

events.title: Small Achievable Goals
events.desc: Odd couple Julie and Kris are thrust together to produce a podcast while grappling with "the change" – aka menopause. The duo embark on a journey of transformation, helping each other through workplace challenges and office politics, dating and relationship drama, and some serious health concerns. Like a phoenix rising from the ashes, they will be reborn as sexy, silver-haired, wizard women! Or at least wiser, less sweaty versions of themselves.

events.title: 7 Little Johnstons
events.desc: "7 Little Johnstons" est une série de téléréalité américaine créée le 31 mars 2015 et diffusée sur TLC. La série s'articule autour des Johnston, une famille de sept personnes, toutes atteintes de nanisme. Les Johnston doivent jongler avec les problèmes familiaux et les problèmes de santé en plus de la rénovation de leur maison.

trailers.label: Get A First Look At The New Season of 7 Little Johnstons!

events.title: Chopped
events.desc: A high energy, fast paced cooking competition that challenges four up-and-coming chefs to turn a selection of everyday ingredients into an extraordinary three-course meal. After each course, a contestant gets “chopped” by our panel of esteemed culinary luminaries until the last man or woman left standing claims victory.

events.title: American Masters
events.desc: American Masters is a PBS television series which produces biographies on enduring writers, musicians, visual and performing artists, dramatists, filmmakers, and others who have left an indelible impression on the cultural landscape of the United States.

trailers.label: Official Trailer | Flannery | American Masters | PBS

events.title: Secrets Declassified with David Duchovny
events.desc: Des opérations secrètes aux expériences étranges, en passant par les dissimulations mortelles et les gadgets malveillants, David Duchovny lève le voile sur tous les secrets gouvernementaux de l'histoire moderne que nous avons toujours soupçonnés, mais auxquels nous n'avons jamais obtenu de réponses.

trailers.label: David Duchovny - New Show Promo - On History Channel in US

events.title: Ultras
events.desc: The future of fandom? Across Scottish football, ultras groups are transforming match days. Beyond the headlines of flares and trouble is a powerful sense of belonging for young men.

events.title: The Dog House
events.desc: Wood Green, l'association caritative pour animaux du Cambridgeshire, recueille chaque année des centaines de chiens abandonnés, déshérités ou négligés. La série suivra les 60 membres de l'équipe qui s'efforcent de lutter contre les pires aspects de notre société du jetable, et sera le témoin d'histoires de sauvetage et de restauration de chiens. Leur but ultime est de trouver à chaque chien un foyer pour la vie et un nouvel être humain à aimer - mais trouver la bonne personne pour chaque chien demande de l'expérience, une bonne connaissance du comportement humain et un peu de chance.

trailers.label: The Dog House: UK | Official Trailer | HBO Max

events.title: The Marlow Murder Club
events.desc: Judith Potts, archéologue à la retraite, vit seule dans un manoir délabré de la paisible ville de Marlow. Elle occupe son temps à créer des mots croisés pour le journal local. Lors d'une de ses baignades habituelles dans la Tamise, Judith entend un coup de feu provenant du jardin d'un voisin et pense qu'un meurtre brutal a été commis.

events.title: Air Crash Investigation
events.desc: In this special season of Air Crash Investigation, every episode examines multiple aviation disasters that prove to have similarities including; engines that separated from their aircrafts mid-flight, mismatched pilot pairings that led to deadly crashes, and improvised landings with tragic consequences.

events.title: Beyond the Brush
events.desc: This series takes you on a journey through the ages of art, exploring the evolution of creativity across centuries. Each episode uncovers hidden secrets, personal struggles, and the cultural shifts that shaped history's greatest masterpieces. From the brushstrokes of genius to the untold stories behind the canvas, we reveal how every work of art holds far more than meets the eye.

events.title: Fatal Fraud
events.desc: Delving into cases where financial schemes spiral into betrayal, violence and murder, exposing the deadly cost of lies fueled by greed.

events.title: Secrets d'Histoire
events.desc: Secrets d'histoire est une émission de télévision diffusée sur France 2 et présentée par Stéphane Bern. Chaque numéro retrace la vie d'un grand personnage de l'histoire et met en lumière des lieux hautement emblématiques du patrimoine.

events.title: PBS Space Time
events.desc: Space Time explores the outer reaches of space, the craziness of astrophysics, the possibilities of sci-fi, and anything else you can think of beyond Planet Earth.

events.title: IMPACT x Nightline
events.desc: Each week, ABC News’ correspondents will leave the anchor desk and studios behind, taking viewers on a journey straight to the source of the stories everyone is talking about, plus the ones no one has even heard of yet. The program’s timely reporting will dive deep into the issues driving the conversations across America and spotlight real people affected by current events featuring hard-hitting investigative reports and profiles of newsmakers from around the globe.

events.title: Manhunt: The Child Snatcher
events.desc: First-hand testimonies tell the story of one of the UK's largest murder investigations. Left in the killer's wake are devastated families and a huge police inquiry piecing together the disturbing puzzle of an unknown serial killer.

events.title: Projet Dernière Chance
events.desc: Le professeur de sciences Ryland Grace se réveille à bord d’un vaisseau spatial, à des années-lumière de la Terre, sans aucun souvenir de qui il est ni de la façon dont il est arrivé là. À mesure que sa mémoire lui revient, il commence à découvrir sa mission : résoudre l’énigme d’une mystérieuse substance qui provoque l’extinction du Soleil. Il doit faire appel à ses connaissances scientifiques et ses idées peu orthodoxes pour sauver toute vie sur Terre mais une amitié inattendue pourrait signifier qu’il n’aura pas à accomplir cette tâche seul.

trailers.label: PROJET DERNIÈRE CHANCE - Bande-annonce officielle VOSTFR
Projet dernière chance (2026) Bande annonce VF en 4K

events.title: Dhurandhar : The Revenge
events.desc: Hamza Ali Mazari n’existe pas. Derrière ce nom se cache Jaskirat Singh Rangi, infiltré au cœur du monde criminel pakistanais. Sa cible : Majo, un fantôme insaisissable.

events.title: Psicópata: El Asesino del Conejo Blanco
Wedding Nightmare : Deuxième partie
events.desc: Peu après avoir échappé à l'attaque sans merci de la famille Le Domas, Grace découvre qu'elle vient d'atteindre un nouveau niveau dans ce jeu cauchemardesque, et cette fois, elle aura à ses côtés sa sœur dont elle s'était éloignée, Faith. Grace n’a qu'une seule chance de survivre, de protéger sa sœur et de s’emparer du Trône du Conseil qui dirige le monde. Traquée par quatre familles rivales prêtes à tout pour le pouvoir, elle sait que l’issue de cette chasse à l'homme déterminera qui régnera sur tout.

trailers.label: Wedding Nightmare : deuxième partie - Spot : Aujourd'hui au cinéma | Searchlight Pictures
Wedding Nightmare : deuxième partie - Première bande-annonce (VOST) | Searchlight Pictures
Wedding Nightmare : deuxième partie - Première bande-annonce (VF) | Searchlight Pictures

events.title: Marketplace
events.desc: Marketplace is a Canadian television series, broadcast on CBC Television. Launched in 1972, the series is a consumer advocacy newsmagazine, which shows investigative reports on issues such as product testing, health and safety, fraudulent business practices and other news issues of interest to product and service consumers.

events.title: The Fifth Estate
events.desc: Each week the fifth estate brings in-depth investigations that matter to Canadians – delivering a dazzling parade of political leaders, controversial characters and ordinary people whose lives were touched by triumph or tragedy.

trailers.label: the fifth estate: Fast Break (Preview) | CBC

events.title: Sleeping with a Killer
events.desc: It follows people who have tragic endings at the hands of husbands, wives, former friends, and lovers.

trailers.label: Sleeping with a Killer | Premieres Monday, June 6 | Lifetime

events.title: Great Performances at the Met
events.desc: The Metropolitan Opera's series of live performance transmissions to movie theaters around the world.

events.title: CNN Town Hall
events.desc: Discussing topics of interest to U.S. viewers.

events.title: CBeebies Bedtime Stories
events.desc: Join a host of different celebrities for a different story read each night just before bedtime.

events.title: Comic Relief
events.desc: Comic Relief is an operating British charity, founded in 1985 by the comedy scriptwriter Richard Curtis and comedian Lenny Henry in response to famine in Ethiopia. The highlight of Comic Relief's appeal is Red Nose Day, a biennial telethon held in March, alternating with sister project Sport Relief.

events.title: Peaky Blinders
events.desc: En 1919, à Birmingham, soldats, révolutionnaires politiques et criminels combattent pour se faire une place dans le paysage industriel de l'après-Guerre. Le Parlement s'attend à une violente révolte, et Winston Churchill mobilise des forces spéciales pour contenir les menaces. La famille Shelby compte parmi les membres les plus redoutables. Surnommés les "Peaky Blinders" par rapport à leur utilisation de lames de rasoir cachées dans leurs casquettes, ils tirent principalement leur argent de paris et de vol. Tommy Shelby, le plus dangereux de tous, va devoir faire face à l'arrivée de Campbell, un impitoyable chef de la police qui a pour mission de nettoyer la ville. Ne doit-il pas se méfier tout autant de la ravissante Grace Burgess ? Fraîchement installée dans le voisinage, celle-ci semble cacher un mystérieux passé et un dangereux secret.

trailers.label: Peaky Blinders Saison 5 | Bande-annonce VF | Netflix France

events.title: Iyanu
events.desc: Set in the magical kingdom of Yorubaland, follow teenage orphan girl, Iyanu, a heroine who must uncover the mystery behind her newfound powers to save her people from an ancient curse threatening to destroy humanity.

events.title: Earth Odyssey with Dylan Dreyer
events.desc: Viewers go on an incredible journey to the wildest points of the globe, uncovering the connection between the environment, wildlife and human beings of exotic locales. Each week, a new destination is revealed, ranging from Africa to Indochina and the Middle East, as well as many untamed islands around the world.

trailers.label: First Look at Earth Odyssey with Dylan Dreyer on NBC!

events.title: ITV News Weekend
events.desc:
ITV News is the name given to weekend news bulletins on the British television network ITV, produced by ITN.

The bulletins feature British national and international news stories, as well as a round-up of the weekend's sports news.

Since 2013, ITV News utilises the ITV News London set for Saturday evening bulletins with the only difference being a smaller desk. This is to allow the same presenter to be used for both bulletins which are broadcast together.

events.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
events.desc: In this entertaining series packed with laughs, celebrity contestants attempt to work out catchphrases based on fun animations. Animations include well known phrases, sayings and even film, song and book titles. The celebrities need to buzz in as quickly as they can when they know the answer and can say what they see in a chance to win money for their chosen charities.

events.title: Celebrity Sabotage
events.desc: Celebrities go undercover with hidden cameras on outrageous secret missions, pranking unsuspecting people to win big cash prizes in this brand new reality game show.

events.title: Saturday Night Live UK
events.desc: British incarnation of NBC's legendary late-night comedy showcase. Broadcast live each week, this UK version brings the high-wire, anything-can-happen energy that makes 'SNL' a cultural force, now reimagined through a distinctly British lens.

events.title: Sullivan's Crossing
events.desc: Après que la vie personnelle et professionnelle de la neurochirurgienne Maggie Sullivan ait été bouleversée, elle rentre chez elle à Sullivan's Crossing. Là-bas, Maggie est obligée de naviguer dans son présent compliqué tout en affrontant le passé douloureux qu'elle a choisi d'ignorer pendant des années.

events.title: SC Featured
events.desc: SC Featured is a special ESPN documentary series that airs compelling stories centered around sports and athletes, ranging from dramatic to comedic.

events.title: The Faithful: Women of the Bible
events.desc: Mise à l'honneur de cinq figures féminines majeures du Livre de la Genèse de l'Ancien Testament, dont les destins ont façonné des religions comme le judaïsme, le christianisme et l'islam...

events.title: Standoff: The FBI, Power and Paranoia
events.desc: Pulling back the curtain on the complex and high stakes relationship between the FBI Director and U.S. President, this series explores their pivotal moments of tension, the FBI's delicate neutrality and its national security implications.

events.title: The Comeback
events.desc: Une actrice de série B est tellement désespérée de relancer sa carrière qu'elle accepte de participer à une télé-réalité appelée "Mon comeback". Les caméras suivent Valérie Cherish alors qu'elle essaie de garder la tête sur les épaules.

trailers.label: The Comeback - Season 1: Trailer - Official HBO UK

events.title: Crookhaven
events.desc: Set at mysterious Crookhaven School, high achieving young crooks from across the world are secretly selected to hone their skills in disciplines such as Deception, Crimnastics, Forgery and Infiltration, learning how to use their skills for good and to do what is right in their own way.

trailers.label: You’ve Never Seen a School Like This… | Crookhaven Official Teaser

events.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
events.desc: Four different celebrities all aim to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith with their baking skills.

events.title: The Hunt
events.desc:
The Bonnie Hunt Show is an American syndicated talk show hosted by Bonnie Hunt. It premiered on September 8, 2008. It is the second show featuring Bonnie Hunt to have that title. The first was a sitcom that ran for one season in 1995 and was retitled Bonnie when it returned after a mid-season hiatus. The show's second and final season premiered on September 8, 2009.

It was announced on December 7, 2009 that The Bonnie Hunt Show would not return for a third season and its final episode aired on May 26, 2010 with reruns airing through September 3.

events.title: The Read
events.desc: Creative performance readings of iconic British novels.

events.title: Asian Network Comedy
events.desc: Stand-up laughs courtesy of the Asian Network.

events.title: Affaires sensibles
events.desc: Adaptation de l'émission de radio à succès de France Inter , "Affaires sensibles". Le présentateur du programme sur la première station de France, Fabrice Drouelle, sera toujours aux commandes de ce nouveau magazine qui sera diffusé une fois par mois et qui sera consacré dans un premier temps aux affaires d'Etat et aux grands scandales politico-financiers

events.title: Morning Call
events.desc: Une lycéenne s'installe enfin dans son appartement, mais elle a pour colocataire le garçon le plus populaire du lycée, et personne ne doit savoir qu'ils vivent ensemble !

events.title: Magicampers
events.desc: Follow the adventures of best friends Darly and Loomis at a day camp for magical creatures. Darly is half-pig and half-Pegasus, Loomis is half-donkey and half-unicorn, and their friends are mythical mashups of all stripes. They dream of becoming legendary, but becoming a legend isn’t about mastering magic powers or winning the biggest prize. It’s about understanding and accepting yourself and others, and working together.

events.title: Antiques Roadshow
events.desc: Antiques Roadshow is a British television show in which antiques appraisers travel to various regions of the United Kingdom to appraise antiques brought in by local people. It has been running since 1979. There are also international versions of the programme.

events.title: Independent Lens
events.desc: This acclaimed Emmy Award-winning anthology series features documentaries and a limited number of fiction films united by the creative freedom, artistic achievement and unflinching visions of their independent producers and featuring unforgettable stories about a unique individual, community or moment in history.

events.title: Just One Thing
events.desc: Simple tips that could transform your health, with some surprising benefits.

events.title: Clash of the Superpowers: America vs China
events.desc: The inside story of how, since Donald Trump first took office, America and China have become locked in a battle for global power and influence.

events.title: Shed & Buried: Classic Cars
events.desc: Henry teams-up with Fuzz Townshend once again. The duo will be doing what they do best: digging in the nation's sheds, barns and outbuildings, this time to (hopefully) find a tidy profit in some vintage motors

events.title: Police Interceptors
events.desc: Documentary series profiling the work of high-speed police units across Britain.

events.title: Deal or No Deal
events.desc: A Dutch version of Deal or No Deal using the Australian format.

events.title: Vintage Mecanic
events.desc: François Allain, expert automobile, achète, restaure et revend des véhicules anciens. Rien ne lui fait peur ! Voitures, motos, tracteurs, bateaux, poids lourds, avions ... tout ce qui possède un moteur peut être sauvé. Il peut même parfois aider certains particuliers à venir à bout de leurs projets les plus fous. Pour réaliser ces chantiers hors norme, notre expert a décidé de s´associer à une équipe de choc, les meilleurs restaurateurs automobiles de France. Mais François Allain le sait, dans le monde de la restauration des véhicules anciens, rien ne se passe jamais comme prévu !

events.title: They Will Kill You
events.desc: Une jeune femme doit survivre toute une nuit, enfermée dans le mystérieux et sordide repaire d'une secte démoniaque, et tout faire pour ne pas devenir leur prochain sacrifice. Une lutte acharnée, des combats saisissants et un humour profondément noir vous attendent.

trailers.label: They will kill you | Bande-annonce officielle (VF) | Zazie Beetz, Tom Felton
They will kill you | Bande-annonce officielle (VOST) | Zazie Beetz, Tom Felton

events.title: Monstrum
events.desc: The world is full of monsters, myths, and legends and Monstrum isn’t afraid to take a closer look. The show, hosted by Emily Zarka, Ph.D., takes us on a journey to discover a new monster for each new episode. Monstrum looks at humans unique drive to create and shape monster mythology through oral storytelling, literature and film.

events.title: The Verdict
events.desc: Raconté par ceux qui y étaient, ce documentaire minutieux chronique le procès de Michael Jackson et examine l'héritage complexe de la star.

events.title: Beyond Chelsea
events.desc: Three of Made in Chelsea’s most iconic personalities, have been away from our screens since leaving the show several years ago. Now in their thirties, navigating through new challenges and life’s biggest milestones, the series will follow them, their families and closest friends, as they juggle family life, host events and run successful businesses.

events.title: K9 PD with Jim Belushi
events.desc: Showcasing moments caught on camera of officers and their K9 partners facing high-stakes calls.

trailers.label: New Series "K9 PD with Jim Belushi" Premieres Wednesday, March 25 at 9pm ET/PT on A&E

events.title: Pawn Stars: Best Of
events.desc: The very best episodes of Pawn Stars.

events.title: Southern Law
events.desc: New series follows law enforcement officers across the South as they respond to calls, protect their communities, and face the realities of policing in one of the country's most dynamic regions.

events.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
events.desc: Every year, thousands of properties are sold at auction, ranging from modest two-up, two-downs to multi-million-pound, waterfront mansions. But they often have some nasty surprises hidden beneath the floorboards and need a bit of love and affection to turn them into a dream home.  Cue Sarah Beeny. She’s been buying, building and transforming properties for thirty-five years and she’s fascinated by the world of auctions. In this series she’ll be offering a dose of realism as brave new owners try and take their auction buys from derelict to diamond.

events.title: Decoding History's Prophecies
events.desc: Throughout history, tales of legendary figures have emerged with remarkable powers to see beyond the veil of time. From ancient China, Egypt and Rome to medieval Europe and the 20th-century United States, join historians, scholars and literati on a deep dive into the esoteric world of healers, hoaxers, mystics and oracles.

events.title: Warship: Life in the Royal Navy
events.desc: Julia Bradbury and JJ Chalmers are given unprecedented access to the Royal Navy.

events.title: Melbourne International Comedy Festival
events.desc: After a less-than-hilarious 2020, the Melbourne International Comedy Festival will be back, delivering COVIDSafe laughs and comedy good-times to Melburnians and the world.

events.title: iHeart Radio Music Awards
events.desc: This revolutionary awards show features the most popular songs and artists in the nation based on the iHeartRadio Chart, a ranking decided by what consumers listen to both on the radio and online.

events.title: This Old House
events.desc: Émission originale de rénovation domiciliaire de la télévision, après une rénovation complète de la maison sur plusieurs épisodes.

events.title: Ask This Old House
events.desc: The crew at This Old House take on some pretty big projects, which means they can only work on one or two houses a year. But homeowners have a virtual truckload of questions on smaller projects, and the This Old House crew is ready to answer. Ask This Old House solves the steady stream of home improvement problems faced by viewers - and the crew even makes house calls!

trailers.label: Ask TOH Sneak Peek | The 16th Season of Ask This Old House

events.title: Yorkshire's Poshest Hotel: Grantley Hall
events.desc: Behind the opulent doors of the hotel, following the team who make the magic happen.

events.title: The Wire: Forensics Murder
events.desc: Following the work of detectives in their relentless pursuit of killers.

events.title: Andermans zaken
events.desc: Reality series in which Kamal Kharmach visits all kinds of entrepreneurs who are faced with an urgent problem and looks for a solution together with them.

events.title: Your Heart Will Be Broken
events.desc: Polina, une lycéenne, est sauvée du harcèlement dans son nouveau lycée et conclut un pacte avec Bars, le principal harceleur : il doit faire semblant d'être son petit ami et la protéger, et elle doit obéir à tout ce qu'il lui dit. Au fil de ce jeu, le couple développe de véritables sentiments, mais sa famille et ses camarades de classe ont de bonnes raisons de vouloir séparer les amoureux.

events.title: Extraordinary Portraits
events.desc: Musician and passionate art collector Tinie Tempah hopes to shine the light on everyday heroes within society by painting portraits of them. These everyday heroes have extraordinary stories and the artists hope to turn these stories into amazing portraits. Portraiture has traditionally been a method of commemorating powerful or wealthy figures in society, however, Tinie hopes to shine a light on the everyday heroes within out society. Famous artists include street artist Dale Grimshaw and hyper-realist Kelvin Okafor.

events.title: Deadly 60
events.desc: Wildlife presenter Steve Backshall tracks down 60 of the world's deadliest animals.

events.title: Beyond Paradise
events.desc: Après avoir quitté le paradis et cherché une vie plus tranquille, Humphrey a accepté un poste d'inspecteur dans la ville natale de sa fiancée Martha. Mais avec le taux de criminalité élevé, les choses risquent d'être plus bruyantes que prévu.

trailers.label: Beyond Paradise Series 4 | Official Trailer - BBC

events.title: Dispatches
events.desc: Long-running Channel 4 documentary series covering issues about British society, politics, health, religion, international current affairs and the environment. Known for featuring a mole inside organisations under journalistic investigation.

events.title: Homebodies
events.desc: Darcy returns home to look after his estranged mother and discovers her unusual housemate: the teenage ghost of his pre-transition self. Darcy must face the past or risk losing himself completely.

trailers.label: Homebodies | Official Trailer | Premieres Saturday 28 March on SBS & SBS On Demand

events.title: Inside Britain's National Parks
events.desc: A look at four of Britain’s 15 national parks, capturing these unique places and meeting the people who live and work in the New Forest, Pembrokeshire Coast, Dartmoor and Northumberland.

events.title: Big Night of Musicals by the National Lottery
events.desc: Jason Manford hosts a celebration of musical theatre, full of showstoppers from the nation’s best-loved shows.

events.title: Betrayal: Secrets & Lies
events.desc: Le podcast #1 True Crime propose une série documentaire hebdomadaire. Huit épisodes explorent des vies bouleversées par des trahisons choquantes, en suivant des survivants d'aveux scandaleux, de vies cachées, d'actes de violence et de dévastations financières.

events.title: Grace
events.desc: Will est un avocat, gay, et Grace est une décoratrice d'intérieur, hétéro. Ils vivent ensemble et s'ils sont les meilleurs amis du monde, leur co-habitation n'est pas de tout repos. Surtout quand Jack, l'ami envahissant de Will, et Karen, la collègue délurée de Grace, passent le plus clair de leur temps dans leur appartement...

events.title: Emergency
events.desc: The crew of Los Angeles County Fire Department Station 51, particularly the paramedic team, and Rampart Hospital respond to emergencies in their operating area.

events.title: Miraculous: Les aventures de Ladybug et Chat Noir
events.desc: Paris, aujourd'hui. Marinette et Adrien sont deux collégiens comme les autres, à la différence près qu’ils ont été choisis pour sauver Paris ! Leur mission : capturer les Akumas du mystérieux Papillon qui transforment les parisiens en super vilains. Grâce à leur kwami, nos deux collégiens se métamorphosent en superhéros : Ladybug, et Chat Noir.

trailers.label: Découvrez en exclusivité le trailer de la saison 2 de Miraculous
Miraculous, les aventures de Ladybug et Chat Noir : la saison 1 en Français

events.title: De Mol
events.desc: Ten candidates have to complete assignments to earn money. However, one of the group members is the Mole. The Mole's goal is to make the assignments fail and keep the amount of money earned as low as possible. The other candidates do not know who the Mole is and need to unmask them. At the end of every episode, the candidates take a multiple-choice test about the mole's identity. The person who gives the least amount of correct answers is "executed" and must leave. This process continues until only two contestants and the Mole remain. The winner is the person with the most correct answers in the final test and they get all of the money earned in previous stages of the game.

events.title: 24 en 24
events.desc:
24 chefs relèvent 24 défis en 24 heures top chrono pour tenter de décrocher un grand prix.

Dans cette compétition culinaire sans pareil animée par Chuck Hughes et Julie Bélanger, chaque chef devra repousser ses limites pour rester en cuisine. À voir sur TVA.

events.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse+
events.desc: Mickey Mouse, Minnie Mouse, Donald Duck, Daisy Duck, Dingo et Pluto sont les vedettes de cette série. Elle a pour principe de pointer de manière interactive avec les spectateurs certains points pour stimuler la résolution de problème. Donald Dingue, Tic et Tac, Pat Hibulaire, Mr. Pettibone, Willie le Géant, Clarabelle Cow, Butch, Figaro le chat et Mortimer Mouse apparaissent aussi dans cette série. Tous ensemble, Mickey et ses amis vivent des aventures fantastiques et variées notamment dans l'océan, dans les airs, en safari, etc.

events.title: Henry David Thoreau
events.desc: Henry David Thoreau helped define modern environmentalism and nonviolent resistance, yet his life has been obscured by myth. The author of Walden and Civil Disobedience, he was brilliant but flawed, idealistic but opinionated. A writer, scientist and activist, his words resonate urgently with today’s challenges as humanity looks for ways to live in harmony with nature—and each other.

trailers.label: Ken Burns presents, Henry David Thoreau | Preview

events.title: History's Greatest Warriors
events.desc: History's Greatest Warriors explores the step-by-step process to produce some of history's most infamous and lethal warriors. Each episode introduces viewers to a legendary fighter - from Samurai, Spartans, Delta Force, Navy SEALS, Vikings, and more - and breaks down the selection, training, weaponry, and combat expertise specifically used.

events.title: Babies
events.desc: Les Muppet Babies sont de retour et les rêves deviennent réalité ! Kermit, Piggy, Fozzie, Animal, Gonzo et Summer sont au cœur de palpitantes aventures tout droit sorties de leur imagination.

events.title: Twenty Twenty Six
events.desc: 48 countries, three host nations - what can possibly go wrong? Former BBC head of values Ian Fletcher is saving the World Cup. So that's all good then. Starring Hugh Bonneville.

trailers.label: Twenty Twenty Six | Official Trailer - BBC

events.title: The Teacher
events.desc: A thriller anthology series detailing the separate stories of teachers.

trailers.label: The Teacher | Series 2 | Official Trailer | Channel 5
The Teacher | Series 1 | Official Trailer | Channel 5

events.title: The Last Hunt for Nazi Gold
events.desc: Historian Guy Walters and Justine Ostrowska embark on a 4,000-kilometre journey across Europe, chasing legends of hidden Nazi treasure. From the mines of Germany and the Amber Room mysteries of Czechia, to stolen art in Austria, the Gold Train myths of Poland, bunker hunts in Italy, and the infamous waters of Lake Toplitz, their search combines discovery and eccentric encounters. Though every site yields more myth than treasure, the series reveals how obsession, paranoia, and history intertwine.

events.title: Renovation Aloha
events.desc: Follow husband-and-wife team Kamohai and Tristyn Kalama as they take on house-flipping projects across the island of Oahu, Hawaii, the most restrictive and difficult flipping location in the country.

events.title: Secrets of the Bees
events.desc: L'explorateur du National Geographic Bertie Gregory explore la vie extraordinaire des abeilles, des insectes parmi les plus importants de la planète. Pendant trois ans, des caméras spéciales ont offert un accès inédit à une ruche pour en révéler l'univers secret. Avec plus de 20 000 espèces qui pollinisent un tiers de notre alimentation, cette série dévoile leur architecture et leur intelligence fascinantes, et perce leurs plus grands secrets.

events.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
events.desc: Cars began rolling off the assembly line over 100 years ago. Two billion vehicles later, we still can’t get enough. THE CARS THAT DROVE US takes viewers into Jeff Dunham’s garage — home to 130 legendary cars. Joined by his cast of characters, Dunham reveals the storied history of era-defining rides, from the Corvette Stingngray to the ill-fated Vector W8, as told by the engineers, artists, and socket slingers who built them.

events.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child the Killer
events.desc: Follows parents confronting the unthinkable truth that their child has grown into a monster who committed horrifying crimes, featuring first-person interviews.

trailers.label: Evil Lives Here: My Child The Killer | ID

events.title: Welcome to Plathville
events.desc: Les neuf enfants aux cheveux de lin de la famille Plath n'ont jamais bu de soda, ne savent pas qui sont Spiderman ou Tom Brady et n'ont jamais regardé la télévision, vivant à distance dans les régions rurales de la Géorgie avec leurs parents «suivent leurs propres règles» Kim et Barry Plath .

events.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
events.desc: Vicky Pattison and her husband Ercan Ramadan face a big decision; should they start a family? As they explore the routes to parenthood and the realities of having kids, will they decide it’s for them?

events.title: Spymasters: The Great Spy Writers
events.desc: Explores the lives, works, and secrets of some of the most brilliant spy authors in literature

events.title: Highway Patrol
events.desc: Highway Patrol was a syndicated, fictional police action series produced from 1955 to 1959, concerning the activities of the highway patrol and their leader, Dan Matthews (who held no rank).  Although filmed in and around the Los Angeles area, the state setting for the stories was never identified, and city and street names were fictionalized.

events.title: A priori
events.desc: Après être sortie major de l'école de police, Iris, 27 ans, intègre un commissariat du Sud de la France. En arrivant dans cette brigade composée de policiers hauts en couleur, elle reçoit un accueil plus que mitigé. Ses connaissances pointues en droit et son insistance sur le respect des règles ne plaît pas à tous, en particulier à Victor, 54 ans, son binôme désigné, un flic solitaire aux méthodes jugées dépassées. Malgré leur différence d’âge et de milieu, lorsque Iris et Victor se voient attribuer une affaire presque classée d’avance, en combinant leurs talents, ils vont découvrir qu'il ne s'agit pas d’un simple accident de la route mais d'un crime avec préméditation. Si le succès rapproche le duo, Victor va rapidement découvrir qu’Iris n’est pas la fille de n’importe qui … Quel secret du passé menace de ressurgir ?

events.title: Helden van Hier: Politie Aalst
events.desc: Excitement, sensation and adrenaline through the eyes of the Aalst police force

events.title: The Valley
events.desc: Saga de la famille Barkley, à Stockton en Californie à la fin du xixe siècle. Victoria Barkley, veuve énergique, dirige un ranch avec l'aide de ses trois fils, de sa fille et du fils illégitime, métis, de son époux.

events.title: Expedition Files
events.desc: L'aventurier Josh Gates voyage à travers l'histoire à la recherche de nouvelles preuves et réponses aux mystères les plus captivants et inexpliqués du monde.

events.title: CBS News Special Report
events.desc: On CBS News Special Report, special events are covered by the CBS news team.

events.title: ABC News Special Report
events.desc: On the ABC News Specials, the stories that need to be covered in great detailed are featured.

events.title: NBC News Special Report
events.desc: Special events are covered by the NBC news team.

events.title: Conspiracies & Coverups
events.desc: Former CIA covert intelligence officer Andrew Bustamante exposes the truth behind some of the most sensational, "ripped from the headlines" conspiracy theories in the all-new series. Driven by a relentless hunt for the truth, Bustamante pulls back the curtain on modern-day mysteries that blur the line between fact and fiction. Using his unique perspective and insider techniques, he investigates, pressure-tests, and challenges prevailing narratives to reveal the hidden forces behind these events and the motives used to manipulate the truth.

events.title: Our New World
events.desc: La série suit l’histoire d’un sympathique chevalier du royaume des sciences tombé en disgrâce. La guerre faisant rage depuis des siècles, il doit affronter la princesse-sorcière des glaces du royaume magique rival. Et contre toute attente, malgré leurs idéaux divergents, les voilà qui tombent désespérément amoureux l’un de l’autre…

trailers.label: Star-crossed lovers Iska and Alice must choose between loyalty and passion in this Limited Edition!
Our Last Crusade or the Rise of a New World | Official Trailer 3
Our Last Crusade or the Rise of a New World | Official Trailer 2
Our Last Crusade or the Rise of a New World | Official Trailer

events.title: Smiling Friends
events.desc: Smiling Friends Inc. est une petite entreprise dont le but principal est d'apporter du bonheur et de faire sourire les gens. La série suit la vie quotidienne et les mésaventures de ses représentants, le paresseux et cynique Charlie, et le joyeux et optimiste Pim, alors qu'ils tentent de remonter le moral et de réconforter les personnes en difficulté qui appellent la hotline de leur entreprise. Ils reçoivent des demandes apparemment simples mais les emplois s'avèrent plus compliqués qu'il n'y paraît, ce qui rend difficile d'apporter le bonheur au monde.

events.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
events.desc: Following one of the few women in Britain to helm an auction house, Irita Marriott. The series follows her as she builds her business in south Derbyshire, helping vendors make money from unwanted items.

events.title: Super Mario Galaxy, le film
events.desc: Mario et Luigi gèrent les tracas du royaume Champignon, se lient d'amitié avec Yoshi, tentent de réhabiliter mini-Bowser et se préparent pour l'anniversaire de Peach. Mais quand un appel à l'aide arrive de l'autre bout de la galaxie, l'équipe part découvrir des mondes nouveaux, des menaces inattendues et des personnages emblématiques, comme Rosalina et Bowser Jr.

events.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
events.desc: Welcome to the Ocean State. It may be America’s smallest, but don’t be fooled — the drama is wicked wild. In a place where everyone knows everyone and family names carry serious weight, nothing is ever truly forgotten. Friendships are built over decades, loyalties are deeply rooted and secrets are guarded at all costs…until betrayal strikes and the cracks begin to show.

trailers.label: SNEAK PEEK: Your First Look at The Real Housewives of Rhode Island Season 1! | RHORI (S1) | Bravo
Your First Look at The Real Housewives of Rhode Island Season 1 | RHORI (S1) | Bravo

events.title: Race Across the World
events.desc: Les duos de voyageurs prennent le départ de cette course vers l'Extrême-Orient sans avion ni smartphone

trailers.label: Race Across The World 2024 Series Trailer

events.title: Race Across the World: The Detour
events.desc: Tyler West hosts Race’s wilder podcast sibling, including analysis from expert Alfie Watts, and travel tales, fails, and holiday hacks from special guests.

events.title: A&E After Dark
events.desc: Behind the scenes at Hull Royal Infirmary to show the night-time challenges facing NHS staff working in the A&E department.

events.title: The Drama
events.desc: Quelques jours avant leur mariage, la relation amoureuse de Charlie et Emma est complètement chamboulée lorsqu’Emma révèle un secret dérangeant issu de son passé. Ce qui aurait dû être une période remplie d’amour et d’attentes se transforme en crise émotionnelle où Charlie commence à douter de tout ce qu’il croyait savoir sur sa fiancée.

events.title: Work It Out Wombats!
events.desc: Full of endless energy, Malik, Zadie and Zeke run, bounce, roll and romp, always on the lookout for interesting Treeborhood problems to solve. Malik is thoughtful, considerate and sometimes set in his ways (which can be a good thing when you’re problem-solving). His speedy, adventurous younger sister, Zadie, is a brainstormer extraordinaire, with ideas that range from silly to very smart. Zeke is the youngest sibling — a funny, curious cuddle-bug who loves to play and explore. Super, their grandmother, is the Superintendent and unofficial “Mayor” of the Treeborhood.

events.title: WNBA Draft
events.desc: The WNBA Draft is a draft of College and other Females for the Women's National Basketball Association that is held annually live on one of the ESPN Networks.

events.title: Triple D Nation
events.desc: Les “diners” et les “drive-ins” vintage étant de plus en plus tendance chez les gourmets, Guy Fieri sillonne les États-Unis à la recherche des meilleurs burgers, barbecues et fritures du pays, souvent plébiscités par les locaux. Dans chaque resto, Fieri discute avec le personnel et les clients et leur demande leur avis sur la nourriture. Guy Fieri sillonne les États-Unis à la recherche des meilleurs burgers, barbecues et fritures, souvent plébiscités par les locaux.

trailers.label: Food Network - Diners, Drive Ins & Dives - Michigan Promo

events.title: The Young Offenders
events.desc: Coming-of-age drama about lovable rogues Conor and Jock as they navigate their awkward teenage years, hatching plans and adventures to help distract from their tough home lives and their inability to stay out of trouble at school.

trailers.label: The Young Offenders - Official Teaser Trailer [HD]

events.title: CBeebies House: Time to Play
events.desc: Join in all the fun with your friends in the CBeebies House. Find things to make and do, watch fun clips and sing along with songs and Number Raps.

events.title: Have I Got News for You
events.desc: Hilarious, totally-irreverent, near-slanderous political quiz show, based mainly on news stories from the last week or so, that leaves no party, personality or action unscathed in pursuit of laughs.

events.title: America's Test Kitchen
events.desc: Equipment reviews, taste tests, and recipes from the test kitchen to the home cook. A team of test cooks that viewers have come to love and trust deconstruct recipes and reveal the test kitchen’s secrets to foolproof cooking at home.

events.title: Cook's Country from America's Test Kitchen
events.desc: A team of cooks travel the country and scour the history books to find the very best traditional and contemporary American dishes, then bring them back to the test kitchen and develop practical, approachable recipes.

trailers.label: Cook's Country from America's Test Kitchen Season 10 Trailer

events.title: The Boat Race
events.desc: Coverage from the River Thames as rowing crews from Oxford and Cambridge Universities race each other over four and a quarter miles from Putney to Mortlake.

events.title: Survivor Québec
events.desc: Complètement isolés de la civilisation et loin de tout confort, les 20 candidats de Survivor Québec devront tester leur endurance et leur forme physique dans une série d’épreuves extrêmes pendant plus de 40 jours. En plus de survivre aux intempéries et de combattre la faim, ils et elles devront user de stratégie pour éviter les éliminations et tenter de devenir le ou la dernier.ère survivant.e afin de remporter un grand prix de 100 000 $.

events.title: Renovation Resort
events.desc: Scott McGillivray fait appel à son ami « rival » de longue date Bryan Baeumler. Ensemble, ils invitent des duos d'entrepreneurs et de designers à rénover pendant sept semaines un ensemble de quatre chalets situés au bord de l'eau. En jeu : 100 000 $!

events.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
events.desc: Chaque scène de crime raconte une histoire. Chaque épisode d'une heure offre le point de vue unique d'experts médico-légaux et relate la recherche des preuves et indices les plus cruciaux, souvent invisibles, afin de rendre justice aux victimes.

events.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
events.desc: Crêpages de chignon, bourdes monumentales et acolytes déjantés rythment la vie mouvementée d'une future styliste, d'une ex-femme de footballeur et de leur entourage.

events.title: When Hope Calls
events.desc: Lilian et Grace sont deux soeurs orphelines ayant grandi loin l'une de l'autre. A l'âge adulte, elles se retrouvent et décident d'ouvrir un orphelinat dans une petite ville à l'aube de l'année 1900.

events.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
events.desc: There is nothing special about Harry Potter - at least that's what his Aunt Petunia always says. On his 11th birthday, a letter of admittance to Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry opens up a hidden world for Harry: one of fun, friendship and magic. But with this new adventure comes great risk as Harry is forced to face a dangerous enemy from his past.

trailers.label: Harry Potter à l'école des sorciers Teaser officiel [VOST]

events.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
events.desc: Cette émission regroupe d'incroyables vidéos de phénomènes paranormaux ayant eu lieu partout à travers le monde. Des experts analysent plan par plan ces archives semblant montrer des visiteurs de l'espace, des créatures étranges ou des esprits vengeurs. Leur but est de comprendre ce qui a pu produire ces images qui ont de quoi glacer le sang des plus sceptiques.

events.title: Secret Garden
events.desc:
Kim Ju Won est un bel homme, arrogant, puéril, propriétaire d'un grand centre commercial et très attaché à son rang social.

Gil Ra Im est une pauvre, talentueuse et belle cascadeuse.

Les chemins de Ra Im et Ju Won se croisent mais les différences de milieux, de manière de vivre et de voir la vie entraînent une dispute.

Un jour, Kim Ju Won et Gil Ra Im s'enfoncent dans une forêt à Jeju et trouvent une étrange maison où réside une dame qui leur offre une bouteille d'alcool. Le lendemain, après l'avoir bue, ils sentent un étrange changement physique… ils ont échangé leurs corps. Ne sachant pas quoi faire, ils décident de mener chacun la vie de l'autre.

Autour d'eux gravitent des personnages qui ne doivent pas apprendre cette histoire. Oska le cousin de Ju Won, un coureur de jupons autrefois chanteur populaire, aujourd'hui une star oubliée. Yun Seul, fille de bonne famille ; en couple avec Oska il y a plusieurs années, elle tente aujourd'hui d'épouser Ju Won.

events.title: Pilgrimage
events.desc: Celebrities take a journey of a lifetime. They all have different faiths and beliefs - will stepping in ancient footsteps on a spiritual journey broaden minds?

events.title: Inside Classical
events.desc: The BBC's orchestras are joined by world-renowned singers and musicians at some of the UK's most beautiful concert halls, performing the best in contemporary and classical music.

events.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
events.desc: Des équipes archéologiques fouillent des villes bibliques à travers le Moyen-Orient, découvrant des civilisations perdues comme la ville de l'Exode en Égypte et la tour de Babel en Irak, apportant un nouvel éclairage sur des histoires célèbres grâce à de superbes images de synthèse et des caméras intégrées.

events.title: Ozoff Road TV
events.desc: From the Outback to the bush, from the bottom end to the top end, the team at Oz Off Road TV takes you to some of the most amazing locations Australia has to offer.

events.title: The Audacity
events.desc: Une psychologue, qui suit des titans de la haute technologie au sein de la Silicon Valley, est en désaccord avec un PDG autoproclamé "inventeur du futur", en raison d'un scandale déclenché par l’exploitation de données personnelles.

events.title: Les Traîtres
events.desc: 18 étrangers sont rassemblés dans un majestueux manoir et devront accomplir des missions en groupe afin de remporter des lingots pour leur cagnotte commune qui pourrait atteindre jusqu’à 100 000 $. Cependant, certains d’entre eux seront des traîtres qui tenteront de saboter le groupe et de « tuer » un fidèle chaque soir dans le but d’être les seuls à mettre la main sur le magot. Alors que mensonge rime avec victoire, les traîtres seront-ils démasqués à temps par les fidèles ?

events.title: Bake Master Battle
events.desc: Dina Pugliese hosts Bake Master Battle, where three teams of elite bakers compete in seasonal-themed challenges. Head judge April Julian, known for hyper-realistic baking, evaluates their confectionary skills.

events.title: Hey Rookie, Welcome to the NFL
events.desc: Hey Rookie, Welcome to the NFL each year will track first-year pro football players known as "Rookies" through the previous year's season.

events.title: Foul Play with Anthony Davis
events.desc: An elite lineup of athletes and celebrities pull the ultimate pranks on their superstar friends.

events.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
events.desc: Buyers with big personalities and sky-high demands search for tropical love nests with breathtaking views in a sexy quest for paradise.

events.title: Beechgrove Garden
events.desc: Gardening show that celebrates Scottish horticulture and growing conditions.

events.title: Château DIY
events.desc: Adventurous British families buy and renovate beautiful chateaux in France.

events.title: I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here! South Africa
events.desc: Fifteen former I’m a Celebrity campmates return to take on South Africa, an even harder proposition that will push them to their limits and test them like never before in bigger and tougher challenges, and a harsher and more unforgiving environment as they compete against each other to become the first ever 'I'm A Celebrity Legend'.

events.title: Ben Fogle in China
events.desc: In beautifully crafted episodes, presenter Ben Fogle embarks on a once-in-a-lifetime journey to understand China - to see its most staggering sights, go beyond the stereotypes and discover its true identity. Ben delves into an epic 3000-year tale of how China has got to where it is today - how centuries of Imperial rule gave way to Communist revolution under Chairman Mao and the breakneck economic transformation as the state capitalist China of recent years has emerged. Mixing both the experiences from the people themselves, and a tour of this magnificent region Ben takes the temperature of a country now at the very centre of humanity in the 21st century. So why and how has contemporary China become so important to all our lives?

events.title: Donal MacIntyre's UK Killer Evidence
events.desc: Renowned investigative journalist and criminologist Donal MacIntyre returns to host Donal MacIntyre's Killer Evidence to demonstrate through 10 UK and US cases, that forensics will always uncover the ‘killer evidence' which brings murderers to justice.

events.title: I'm A Celebrity... Unpacked (South Africa)
events.desc: I'm A Celebrity... Unpacked is your place to get MORE of your favourite show! We're deep diving into the dynamics around the campfire and bringing you opinions hotter than the southern-hemi sun! Join Sam Thompson and Kemi Rodgers after I'm A Celebrity... South Africa every night for the juiciest debrief of an unmissable series!

events.title: Mastermind Australia
events.desc: Contestants must answer as many questions as possible on their chosen specialist subject within two minutes.

events.title: Finding Your Roots with Henry Louis Gates Jr.
events.desc: Noted Harvard scholar Henry Louis Gates, Jr.  has been helping people discover long-lost relatives hidden for generations within the branches of their family trees.  Professor Gates utilizes a team of genealogists to reconstruct the paper trail left behind by our ancestors and the world’s leading geneticists to decode our DNA and help us travel thousands of years into the past to discover the origins of our earliest forebears.

trailers.label: FINDING YOUR ROOTS | Season 4 Official Teaser Trailer | PBS

events.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
events.desc: L'historienne populaire Lucy Worsley devient détective, utilisant de nouvelles preuves et des techniques modernes pour résoudre certains des mystères les plus persistants de l'histoire britannique

events.title: I Made It at Market
events.desc: Dom Chinea revisits amazing makers who have turned their talents into life-changing businesses and finds out how much money they are earning from their skills.

events.title: Inside Barlinnie
events.desc: Inside 'The Big Hoose'. The reality of life behind the bars of Scotland's infamous prison. As it finally closes its doors, staff and inmates reflect on a violent, chaotic history.

events.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
events.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and his partner Marj throw themselves into the restoration of a derelict chapel in Wales. As they explore their new home, it seems they're not alone...

events.title: Britain's Murder Map
events.desc: Vicky McClure, and her historian husband, Jonny Owen, travel the UK exploring historic, culturally significant crimes that have changed the face of modern Britain. From unsolved murders, to miscarriages of justice that have changed the law; each episode features Vicky and Jonny doing a deep dive into each case. Speaking to experts, historians, police officers and victims’ families, they investigate the lasting impact each murder has left on the community and why these cases still resonate today.

events.title: Francis Bourgeois & Chris Harris: We Saved A Train
events.desc: Trainspotting star Francis Bourgeois teams up with petrolhead Chris Harris. The duo restore a wrecked locomotive, built in 1961, refusing to let money worries and supersized engineering hurdles put a dent in their friendship.

events.title: The Chocolate Queen
events.desc: Kirsten Tibballs, l'un des meilleurs chefs pâtissiers au monde, dévoile enfin ses secrets ! Dans cette série, Kirsten va vous montrer toute une série de trucs, d'astuces et de méthodes incroyablement ingénieuses et novatrices qui vous permettront d'apporter une touche d'originalité à vos préparations culinaires.

events.title: The Floor
events.desc: Les joueurs des Los Angeles Devil dominent la ligue de basketball. La jeune Ahsha rejoint le groupe de danseuses de l'équipe et, contre l'avis de sa mère qui n'est pas étrangère à ce monde insidieux, plonge dans ce milieu sans avoir conscience de ce qui l'attend réellement : argent, célébrité, sexe et pouvoir, l'univers des Devil Girls est cruel et sans pitié.

trailers.label: Hit The Floor | Official Super Trailer | Premieres January 18th + 10/9C | VH1

events.title: Love & Hip Hop: Miami
events.desc: Suivez la jeune élite hip-hop dans ses efforts pour « créer » ou « maintenir » une vie à Miami.

trailers.label: Love & Hip Hop: Miami | Season 1 Official Super Trailer | Premieres January 1st 9/8c

events.title: Michael Jackson: An American Tragedy
events.desc: De l’enfant prodige à l’icône mondiale, cette série inédite en 3 épisodes explore le génie, les controverses et les tragédies qui ont façonné la légende de Michael Jackson. Diffusée à l’occasion de la sortie cinéma du très attendue biopic qui lui est consacré, elle offre un éclairage inédit sur le parcours hors norme du Roi de la pop.

trailers.label: Michael Jackson, l'envers d'une légende sur France 4

events.title: The Assembly
events.desc: Nothing is off limits as a group of autistic, neurodivergent and/or learning disabled interviewers ask the questions.

events.title: Pointless
events.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present a celebrity version of the general knowledge quiz in which contestants try to come up with the answers that nobody else could think of.

events.title: Back from the Brink
events.desc: Un démon dragon recherche ses ossements de pouvoir, mais pour réussir, il doit unir ses forces avec une femme qui possède un artefact spécial !

trailers.label: [Trailer] Back From The Brink | Coming to Viu TOMORROW!

events.title: Studio C
events.desc: A fresh live comedy sketch series that explores the funny side of everyday life.

trailers.label: An Unscented Place Official Trailer - Studio C

events.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
events.desc: Paul’s fascination with trains stems from his childhood.  His father was a driver on the London Underground and when, as a young boy, Paul witnessed his dad driving a train across Putney Bridge, it sparked a lifelong fascination of railways. Now, he is following in his father’s footsteps by joining the drivers upfront and in control of some of the world’s most amazing trains and experiencing the best views as he travels through breathtaking landscapes in the UK and Europe.  From steep gradients and tight curves to pinpoint platform stops, Paul will learn what it takes to keep these mighty machines on track. Visiting Germany, France, Switzerland, Wales, Northern England and Isle of Wight, he’ll meet the people who keep the railways running - from engineers and conductors to passengers with fascinating stories of their own.

events.title: Taskmaster
events.desc: Greg Davies est le Taskmaster, et avec l'aide de son assistant toujours fidèle Alex Horne, ils entreprendront de tester les ruses, l'esprit, la sagesse et les compétences de cinq comédiens hyper-compétitifs. Qui sera couronné champion Taskmaster dans ce tout nouveau jeu télévisé ?

events.title: Jane McDonald in Nashville
events.desc: The two-part series follows beloved television personality and seasoned traveller, Jane McDonald as she embarks on a once in a lifetime dream trip to Music City.

events.title: Mordu de la pêche avec Cyril Chauquet : Le retour
events.desc: Cyril Chauquet is back, searching for giant fish all over the planet; from the Mexican desert to the plains of Mongolia, via the turquoise waters of the Seychelles, he tracks the fiercest and most powerful species; from the legendary roosterfish to the mythical taimen, from the powerful barracuda to the voracious lingcod, each new species pushes Cyril further, into shark-infested waters, between sharp rocks, deadly currents, furious rapids and crushing heat.

events.title: Belle Collective: Birmingham
events.desc: CEO and beauty mogul Stormi Steele, beloved by viewers of Love & Marriage: Huntsville, returns to television bolder than ever after a hyper-focused two-year break scaling her multimillion-dollar empire and wildly successful brand, Canvas Beauty. In Belle Collective: Birmingham, Stormi connects with a circle of driven, successful southern Belles in the rising cultural hub of Birmingham who are determined to transform the city into a thriving destination for beauty and influence. Stormi must navigate Birmingham's deeply connected social and business scenes to forge alliances with fellow powerhouses including her savvy CFO Amber Jones, entrepreneur Tiffaney Jones, marketing strategist Funmi Ford, model and marketer Synetta Hawkins, and talent manager K'La Inman.

events.title: Great Performances: Now Hear This
events.desc: Now Hear This is a primetime PBS miniseries now filming its 5th season that brings the greatest music ever written to millions of viewers, with modern storytelling that captivates. Now Hear This opens the world of classical music to new audiences, while giving existing fans new ways to love their music. Now Hear This is presented by Great Performances, celebrating its 50th season on PBS, and this year begins international distribution.

events.title: Unreported World
events.desc: Unreported World is a foreign affairs programme produced by Quicksilver Media Productions and broadcast by Channel 4 in the United Kingdom. Over the course of its twenty-four series, reporters have travelled all over the world in an attempt to uncover stories usually ignored by the world media.

events.title: First Dates
events.desc: Interactive dating experiment in which real dates are filmed, and then viewers get the chance to apply to date the unsuccessful participants the following week.

events.title: Beast
events.desc: Patton James abandonne son rêve de pratiquer les arts martiaux mixtes pour subvenir aux besoins de sa femme, Luciana et de leur fils. Lorsque son frère, Malon, subit une grave blessure et doit faire face à des pressions financières, Patton décide de le venger lors d'un combat avec l'aide de l'entraîneur vétéran Sammy.

events.title: Lucky Dog
events.desc: Brandon trains dogs to the point where they can find forever homes.

events.title: Zombie House Flipping
events.desc: Des rénovateurs transforment des maisons de la ville d'Orlando qui ont été abandonnées.

trailers.label: Zombie House Flipping Premieres Jan. 30 at 10/9c on FYI

events.title: Building Back America's Trades
events.desc: Chronicles the stories of students, mentors, and teachers as they remake the trades industry and themselves.

events.title: Mission Unstoppable
events.desc: Highlighting the fascinating female innovators who are on the cutting edge of science -- including zoologists, engineers, astronauts, codebreakers and oceanographers. Host Miranda Cosgrove profiles female STEM (science, technology, engineering and math) superstars in the fields of social media, entertainment, animals, design and the internet -- all categories key to the teen experience. Academy Award-winning actress Geena Davis serves as executive producer, bringing her passion for creating change in the portrayal of strong female characters in entertainment and media that positively influences young viewers, along with Cosgrove.

events.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
events.desc: James Dainard and team hunt for, fix, and flip zombie houses in the Seattle area.

events.title: Be My Guest with Ina Garten
events.desc: Ina Garten welcomes fun, interesting people into her home for food and conversation.

events.title: Philly Homicide
events.desc: Host and retired detective Lt. Chris McMullin gives insights on crimes that took place in a region steeped in rich history and vibrant culture that is known for tenacity and grit. Archival footage, exclusive first-person interviews with former and current Philadelphia area detectives, and cinematic recreations provide an insider's view into the heartrending cases Philly's finest diligently worked to solve. The series delves into the twists and turns of the most harrowing murders committed in the city known as America's birthplace.

events.title: Kara Swisher Wants to Live Forever
events.desc: Kara Swisher investigates the fast-growing world of longevity and anti-aging, cutting through the hype to separate real science from the wishful thinking. Fueled by the early death of her father and her own very serious health scare, she explores how far humans will go to extend their lives. Bringing decades of experience covering the technology industry, Swisher interrogates the belief among the world's wealthiest innovators that sheer ambition can finally outsmart mortality. In each episode, she draws on her deep connections in Silicon Valley and beyond, stepping in as both reporter and test subject to examine the unconventional emerging technologies shaping how long and how well we may live.

trailers.label: Kara Swisher Wants to Live Forever | Official Trailer | CNN

events.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
events.desc: Comedy short films from new and established talent. Showcasing original, weird and very funny films.

trailers.label: Brand New BBC Comedy Shorts: Exclusive Trailer

events.title: Bridge of Lies Celebrity Specials
events.desc: Teams of celebrities take on the nail-biting quiz hosted by Ross Kemp.

events.title: Blankety Blank
events.desc:
Blankety Blank is a British comedy game show based on the 1977–1979 Australian game show Blankety Blanks.

The British version ran from 18 January 1979 to 12 March 1990 on BBC One, hosted first by Terry Wogan and later by Les Dawson. Regular members of the celebrity panel on this version included Kenny Everett, Lorraine Chase, Gareth Hunt, Gary Davies, and Cheryl Baker.

A revival fronted by Lily Savage was produced by the BBC from 26 December 1997 to 28 December 1999, followed by ITV from 7 January 2001 to 10 August 2002. This version was produced by Grundy, then Thames.

events.title: FLEX
events.desc: Jake Armstrong et ses meilleurs amis se transforment à l'improviste en super-héros et découvrent que leurs moyens d'action dépassent ceux des adolescents ordinaires.

trailers.label: Stretch Armstrong & the Flex Fighters - ‘Heroes Gone Rogue’ Season 2 Official Preview

events.title: Révolution
events.desc: Plus de 3000 danseurs se sont présentés aux préauditions en solo, en duo ou en groupe, mais seulement une centaine ont été retenus pour la phase des auditions de l’émission. Les danseurs préparent une chorégraphie de leur choix dans leur style de danse de prédilection, avant de venir faire leur performance sur scène devant les trois maîtres. Qui obtiendra le titre de meilleur danseur du Québec et remportera le grand prix de 100 000$? Révolution, c'est l'éloge de la danse.

events.title: Collector's Call
events.desc: Step inside the nostalgic world of personal collections. Explore the amazing treasures of toys, books, memorabilia and more. Meet the real people with a passion for their possessions.

events.title: Euphoria
events.desc: À 17 ans, Rue Bennett, fraîchement sortie de désintox, cherche à donner un sens à son existence. Elle se lie très vite à Jules Vaughn, une fille trans récemment arrivée en ville après le divorce de ses parents. Dans leur sillage gravitent Nate Jacobs, un sportif dont les problèmes de colère masquent des complexes sexuels ; Maddy Perez, la petite amie de Nate ; Chris McKay, star de l'équipe de football qui peine à suivre les cours ; Cassie Howard, dont le passif sexuel continue de la poursuivre ; Lexi Howard, jeune sœur de Cassie et amie d'enfance de Rue ; et Kat Hernandez, en pleine exploration de sa sexualité.

trailers.label: EUPHORIA - Saison 3 | Bande-annonce officielle | HBO Max
EUPHORIA - Saison 3 | Bande-annonce officielle | HBO Max | VOST
Euphoria l Bande-annonce l Épisode spécial Jules

events.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for France
events.desc: Eva Longoria explores French cuisine and culture.

events.title: The Olivier Awards
events.desc: The Olivier Awards is an annual awards ceremony that is widely recognised as the most prestigious stage honours event on the UK calendar.The awards are given to individuals involved in West End productions and other leading non-commercial theatres based in London across a range of categories covering plays, musicals, dance, opera and affiliate theatre.

events.title: Zero Stars
events.desc: Roisin Conaty and Sara Pascoe journey across the globe to sample the worst reviewed accommodation, restaurants and experiences.

events.title: Your Song
events.desc:
I Wanna Hear Your Song suit l'histoire d'amour mystérieuse de la timbalière, Hong Yi Yeong et d'un pianiste dans un orchestre, Jang Yun.

Cette dernière a été témoin d'un meurtre dont elle n'arrive pas à s'en rappeler et souffre d'insomnie depuis. Afin de l'aider à soigner son insomnie, Jang Yun l'appelle tous les soirs. Ensemble, ils vont essayer de découvrir la vérité sur ce meurtre.

events.title: The Greatest
events.desc: Join our star-studded cast as we look back at some of the greatest Reality TV moments. Shock eliminations, explosive drama and iconic one-liners. Celebrate the chaos that got the country talking.

events.title: America Says
events.desc: In this family-friendly game show, two teams face off to guess Americans' responses to questions covering a variety of topics.

events.title: WNBA Countdown
events.desc: WNBA Countdown serves as the primer for game telecasts on both ESPN2 and ESPN. It features a less-scripted format, highlighted by a lively round-table discussion and debate of the top story lines around the league.

events.title: The 1% Club
events.desc: A unique, compelling and funny game show that tests the nation's intelligence, based on a scientific survey. Whether you're a contestant vying for the cash prize or a viewer playing with your friends and family, answer enough questions correctly and you could earn yourself a place in the 1% Club: an elite group of people who can honestly say they've outwitted 99% of the population.

events.title: Rock the Block
events.desc: HGTV renovation stars face off against one another - they have just weeks and a limited budget to renovate four identical blank-slate homes on the same block with their signature styles. The designers who add the most property value netting the highest appraisal get bragging rights and the street named in their honor.

events.title: Boy Band Confidential
events.desc: Découvrez la face cachée du phénomène des boys bands. Derrière la gloire de ces idoles des jeunes se cachent des affaires bien moins glorieuses...

trailers.label: Boy Band Confidential | Official Trailer | ID

events.title: The Quiz with Balls
events.desc: Hosted by comedian Jay Pharoah, families must work together as each contestant faces a quiz where each wrong answer results in a massive ball rapidly descending and knocking them into a pool below; the final dry family member plays the final round for a $100,000 grand prize.

events.title: Great Japanese Railway Journeys
events.desc: Michael Portillo is in Japan for a breathtaking railway journey through the country that launched the magnificent Shinkansen bullet train.

events.title: Shrift the Thrift
events.desc: Couples scour the UK's charity shops to see if they can make even more money at auction for the items they purchase and raise money for their chosen causes.

events.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club
events.desc: What has Duggee got planned for us today? Come and join Happy, Roly, Tag, Norrie and Betty, you’ll have so much fun at Hey Duggee’s Squirrel Club!

trailers.label: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club | BRAND NEW SPIN OFF - OUT NOW | Hey Duggee

events.title: How to Clean Up for Cash
events.desc: How much is your clutter worth? Josie Gibson secretly infiltrates the homes of clutter culprits, boxes up their belongings and gets ready to sell the lot!

events.title: Construction Fails
events.desc: Construction Fails happen every day, but sometimes the damage is catastrophic. This factual, fast-paced show investigates the most spectacular mishaps, what went wrong, and how the disaster could have been averted. Combining live footage with CGI animation, this show examines well-known disasters, such as the Notre Dame fire, and the collapse of the Georgia Dome, but also more minor incidents. Presented in a light-hearted and accessible manner, Construction Fails shows what happens when things go drastically wrong.

events.title: Missed Call
events.desc: In a picturesque French village, English single mother Sarah's daughter disappears while on a school exchange trip, soon after attempting a late-night call to her mother. Despite indifference from local authorities and the host family, Sarah goes on a search for her daughter that spirals into a dangerous race against time.

events.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
events.desc: The landmark documentary series that captures real life drama at its most intense, following police detectives around the clock as they investigate major crimes.

trailers.label: TRAILER | 24 Hours In Police Custody | New Series | Available On All 4

events.title: The Sky at Night
events.desc: Your monthly journey through the fascinating world of space and astronomy with the latest thinking on what's out there in space and what you can see in the night sky.

trailers.label: Professor Stephen Hawking's black hole theories - The Sky at Night: Preview - BBC Four

events.title: Alter Ego
events.desc: Suspense, mort et amour. Alter Ego est une série dramatique et mystérieuse qui se déroule dans un monde unique où la mort se déplace parmi la population pour accomplir sa tâche : toucher ceux dont la "dernière heure" a sonné. Dans son repaire, la banque internationale Salvator, les nombreux clones de la Mort n'ont qu'une seule apparence. Celle d'une jeune femme élégante aux cheveux roux. Une fois que les clones se déplacent parmi nous, ils prennent l'apparence de leur alter ego, qui est différent pour chaque clone. La Mort est impitoyable, séduisante et inarrêtable.

events.title: The Dark Wizard
events.desc: Documentaire en quatre parties sur la vie et les exploits de Dean Potter, grimpeur, highliner et base‑jumper considéré comme l’un des plus visionnaires mais aussi des plus controversés de son époque. Le film/mini‑série suit à la fois ses réalisations spectaculaires (ascensions en solo, traversées de slackline à grande hauteur, vols en wingsuit) et explore sa dimension introspective, ses démons intérieurs, pour « dévoiler qui Dean était vraiment » au‑delà de la légende du « Dark Wizard », en montrant comment sa quête d’absolu, de liberté et de spiritualité l’a conduit à repousser sans cesse les limites du risque.

events.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
events.desc: Across the world are dreamy houses at jaw-droppingly low prices, and expert local guides are ready to show house hunters how to dream big and own one! Our buyers experience rich cultural traditions, all in the pursuit of living their international dream.

events.title: Sam & Ade Go Birding
events.desc: Samuel West's been a keen bird watcher for over 20 years, and for his next few trips, he's invited along his mate Adrian Edmondson, a complete birding novice, to introduce him to some of the UK's most beautiful birds and habitats.

events.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers
events.desc: The smiling parents, the respectable groom, the helpful official... all with evil inside. Britain's Most Evil Killers explores the crimes of Britain's most brutal killers.

trailers.label: Britain's Most Evil Killers premieres tonight 9pm exclusive to Pick

events.title: MasterChef
events.desc: Three celebrated food experts put the latest group of contestants through a series of challenging elimination rounds and turn one home cook into a culinary master.

events.title: NOVA
events.desc: PBS' premier science series helps viewers of all ages explore the science behind the headlines. Along the way, NOVA demystifies science and technology, and highlights the people involved in scientific pursuits.

events.title: Love Island: Beyond The Villa
events.desc: Following everyone’s favorite Season 6 Islanders around Los Angeles as they navigate new careers, evolving friendships, newfound fame, and complex relationships outside of the Love Island villa.

events.title: Homicide Hunter: American Detective
events.desc: Joe Kenda trades in his own case files to bring viewers astounding investigations from across the country, with each episode featuring a different homicide detective whose tireless efforts helped put a killer behind bars and bring justice for the victim.

events.title: One Day In My Body
events.desc: This bold and intimate series hands the camera to those living with some of the world's rarest medical conditions. Meet an individual allergic to water, a woman who ages at an unusually rapid rate, a woman who has been unable to empty her bladder in years, and other complex disorders that leave the most skilled medical professionals searching for answers.
