events.title: On the Case with Paula Zahn
events.desc: Embarquez aux côtés de Paula Zahn au cœur de fascinantes enquêtes pour meurtres et d'affaires aux multiples rebondissements.

events.title: Horizon
events.desc: Horizon tells amazing science stories, unravels mysteries and reveals worlds you've never seen before.

events.title: Grayson Perry Has Seen the Future
events.desc: Artist Sir Grayson Perry visits Silicon Valley to explore how AI and robotics will shape the future, in a series that raises profound questions about what it is to be human.

events.title: Events That Changed Australia
events.desc: This 8 part series takes an in-depth look at the critical turning points in Australia’s history, from natural disasters to social upheavals, through the lens of hindsight. Combining rich, never-before-seen archival footage with candid interviews, the series investigates not just what happened, but how these events fundamentally altered the country and its people.

events.title: Ligne de feu
events.desc: Le capitaine Jordan Wright et son escouade d’élite obtiennent une permission afin d’assister au mariage de leur artilleur-infirmier Alberto dans une petite ville d'Amérique du Sud. La célébration tourne au drame lorsqu'un cartel assiège la ville, forçant l'escouade à tout risquer dans une bataille sans merci.

events.title: Bergerac
events.desc: Jim Bergerac est un sergent détective au Foreigners Office qui aime faire les choses à sa manière. Tout en luttant contre ses propres démons, Bergerac a le don de se retrouver dans des ennuis, et parfois même de les provoquer.

events.title: Engineering Europe
events.desc: This series reveals the extraordinary secrets of Europe’s engineering wonders. Filmed across six great nations, it will explore record-breaking construction projects, innovative machines and vehicles, and ingenious design. It will also reveal the hidden engineering that drives Europe’s most iconic landmarks and the people who keep them working today.

events.title: Ethernel
events.desc: Dans un monde bouleversé par ETHERNA, une borne capable de parler avec les morts grâce à leurs objets les plus précieux, la brigade Ethernel retrouve les objets transitionnels des victimes assassinées et les interroge pour résoudre les crimes.  David Novack, enquêteur hanté par le meurtre non élucidé de sa femme, découvre lors d’une enquête que son assassin est encore en vie. Sur cette nouvelle piste, il croise Lara di Angeli, mystérieuse policière italienne, elle-même à la recherche d’un objet transitionnel aux conséquences inestimables. Commence alors une traque où chaque objet ouvre une mémoire, chaque mort révèle une vérité les amenant à revisiter leur passé et révélant leurs plus pesants secrets.

events.title: Traffic Cops
events.desc: An action-packed documentary series following Yorkshire-based law enforcers. Originally shown by the BBC (2003-2016), this is the new reboot format of the show and was titled "All New Traffic Cops" for two series. It was renamed again in 2018 as "Traffic Cops: On the Edge" and then as "Traffic Cops".

events.desc: Antiques Roadshow is a British television show in which antiques appraisers travel to various regions of the United Kingdom to appraise antiques brought in by local people. It has been running since 1979. There are also international versions of the programme.

events.desc: Cette série, qui présente des interviews révélatrices de survivants s'exprimant publiquement pour la première fois, ainsi que des informations rares sur les réactions de la CIA et des Soviétiques, met au jour un réseau de secrets, d'erreurs de jugement et de pertes humaines. Des images inédites et saisissantes, tournées à l'intérieur de la zone d'exclusion nucléaire, montrent comment ce territoire meurtri est à nouveau assiégé, la guerre s'étendant à l'un des endroits les plus dangereux de la planète.

events.desc: Images d'archives, reconstitutions glaçantes et interviews exclusives apportent un éclairage nouveau sur la tragédie, et les deux frères, qui ont plongé une ville dans la terreur.

events.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
events.desc: Dr. Sandra Lee, also known as Dr. Pimple Popper, is the most famous dermatological surgeon in the world and an internationally beloved personality. She has dedicated her life to sharing her incredible skills with her huge audience, as she helps hundreds of suffering patients who are unable or unwilling to find treatment for their painful, oozing cysts, fatty tumors, and infinitely complex, life-affecting dermatological issues. Now, Dr. Lee is ready to take her practice to the next level. The doctor has made modern additions to her main office which include an entire new wing of patient rooms, and many new staff and doctors. For the first time, Dr. Lee will also be providing intimate self-shot footage of her life outside the office.

Dans ce climat de tension et de chaos, une audacieuse opération criminelle s’organise, utilisant l’évacuation comme écran de fumée pour un braquage minutieusement orchestré. Tandis que les autorités se lancent dans une course contre la montre pour contenir la crise, les alliances se brouillent et les limites morales sont franchies. Le film entraîne habilement les spectateurs dans une série de rebondissements calculés, offrant un divertissement aussi intense que captivant.

Tous avec la magnifique toile de fond des maisons somptueuses et des emplacements exclusifs dans lesquels ces femmes vivent.

events.title: College GameDay
events.desc: College GameDay is an ESPN entertainment show previewing college football games. It first aired in 1987 with Tim Brando as host and Lee Corso and Beano Cook as commentators, giving an overview of college football games, but the show underwent a radical transformation beginning in 1993, and began incorporating live broadcasts. The official name of the show is College GameDay built by The Home Depot. There is a separate radio broadcast, ESPN Radio College GameDay, on ESPN Radio. Today, the only original cast member remaining is Lee Corso. Rece Davis serves as host and Kirk Herbstreit is Corso's counterpart. Starting in 2008, Desmond Howardhas been added to the cast in the show's introduction. Craig James served as an analyst from 1990 to 1995. Erin Andrews joined the GameDay crew as a co-hos

Le film raconte l’histoire de Michael Jackson au-delà de la musique, depuis la découverte d’un talent hors du commun en tant que leader des Jackson Five, jusqu’à l’artiste visionnaire dont l’ambition créative a alimenté une quête incessante pour devenir le plus grand artiste au monde.  Mettant en lumière sa vie hors scène et ses performances les plus emblématiques de ses débuts en solo, le film offre au public une place au premier rang pour découvrir Michael Jackson comme jamais auparavant.

events.title: White House Correspondents' Association Dinner
events.desc: The White House Correspondents' Association (WHCA) is an organization of journalists who cover the White House and the President of the United States. The WHCA was founded on February 25, 1914, by journalists in response to an unfounded rumor that a Congressional committee would select which journalists could attend press conferences of President Woodrow Wilson. The WHCA operates independently of the White House. Among the more notable issues handled by the WHCA are the credentialing process, access to the President and physical conditions in the White House press briefing rooms. Its most high-profile activity is the annual White House Correspondents' Association Dinner, which is traditionally attended by the president and covered by the news media.

events.desc: Special coverage of news events on MS NOW.

events.title: E:60
events.desc:
E:60 is a weekly investigative journalism newsmagazine show. It premiered on ESPN on October 16, 2007 at 7:00 p.m. ET, 4:00 p.m. PT. The show is one hour long.

E:60 covers stories that relate to both American and international sports. Reporters from the network interview those surrounding the stories, and they also discuss what was involved in covering the stories. Many of the stories' subjects are of a serious nature, such as a story featured on the premiere show about Jason Ray, the student who portrayed the North Carolina Tar Heels' mascot Ramses, being killed after he was struck by a car.

Reporters and contributors on the show include ESPN personalities Jeremy Schaap, Rachel Nichols, Lisa Salters, Jeffri Chadiha, Michael Smith, and Chris Connelly.

Rip Off Britain is a BBC One series which exposes Britain's rip-offs and helps consumers. It began on 30 November 2009, presented by former news journalists Angela Rippon, Gloria Hunniford and Jennie Bond. Newsreader Julia Somerville replaced Bond from series three.

From the second series onwards, the show was remade into cut-down editions of 30 minutes which air in a prime time slot on Friday evenings.

events.title: Half Man
events.desc: Niall et Ruben sont comme des frères. Pas de lien de sang, mais une proximité totale. L’un est fougueux et loyal, l’autre doux et réservé. Deux jeunesses qui se croisent, unies par la mort et les circonstances, ne comptant que l’un sur l’autre… Trente ans plus tard, Ruben débarque au mariage de Niall. Il est nerveux, agité, différent de d’habitude. Et bientôt, une explosion de violence secoue leur vie, des années 80 à aujourd’hui. Capturant trois décennies de ces hommes brisés, HALF MAN explore la fraternité, la violence et la fragilité intense des relations masculines. Quand tout s’effondre… ce sont parfois les liens les plus proches qui se brisent le plus fort.

events.title: Salisbury Poisonings: The Untold Story
events.desc:
Telling the story of the 2018 poisoning of ex-Russian spy Sergei Skripal and his daughter Yulia in the quiet city of Salisbury, an incident that sent shockwaves across the globe. Just months later, British mother of three Dawn Sturgess died accidentally after coming into contact with Novichok, the nerve agent used in the original attack.

With gripping first-hand testimony, the shocking story of the 2018 poisoning of an ex-Russian spy in Salisbury. Featuring unparalleled access to police, doctors, government officials and the military.

events.title: Inside the Tower of London
events.desc: At 950 years old, the Tower of London is one of the oldest landmarks in Britain and has had many famous residents over the centuries, from Guy Fawkes to the Kray twins. But the only people who live in the ancient stronghold these days are the 37 ‘Yeoman Warders’ – or Beefeaters – who guard the walls and look after the three million visitors who walk through the gates every year.

events.title: Urzila

Each episode mashes up razor‑sharp stand-up with cheeky, fast‑firing sketches, many of them plucked straight from the wildly funny stories she riffs on during her live shows. The whole thing crackles with mischief. It’s a TV series powered by two decades of stand-up comedy chaos: bold, boisterous, and unmistakably Urzila.

events.title: Snatched
events.desc: In 1991, Vicky Hamilton and Dinah McNicol vanished six months apart. The cases stayed cold until 2006, when Angelika Kluk's murder led to an arrest as DNA linked the perpetrator to all three.

events.title: Hokum
events.desc: Peinant à terminer son dernier roman, l'Américain Ohm Bauman décide de se rendre en Irlande afin de s'acquitter d'une promesse longtemps différée: répandre les cendres de ses parents à proximité de l'hôtel où le couple avait passé son voyage de noces. Peu après son inscription dans ce même établissement, l'écrivain apprend de la bouche de la barmaid Fiona que la suite nuptiale, interdite d'accès, serait hantée par une sorcière. Quand la jeune employée disparaît mystérieusement, et que des soupçons pèsent sur un vieil homme au passé tragique vivant dans le bois voisin, Bauman ouvre sa propre enquête.

trailers.label: HOKUM I Le 29 avril au cinéma

events.desc: Un groupe d'animaux se rebellent contre leurs maîtres humains et prennent le contrôle de la ferme. Leur révolte terminée, ils sont confrontés à de nouveaux défis sous le règne d'un cochon rusé nommé Napoléon. Cette situation les oblige à trouver le courage de s'opposer à Napoléon.

events.title: Kentucky Derby
events.desc: The Kentucky Derby is a horse race that is held annually in Louisville, Kentucky, United States, on the first Saturday in May, capping the two-week-long Kentucky Derby Festival. NBC currently broadcasts it in its entirely along with pre- and post-show features.

events.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
events.desc: Dermot O'Leary goes back to his roots in this foodie adventure. Follow him as he explores all the gastronomic delights that the Emerald Isle has to offer.

events.title: Two Guys Garage
events.desc:
Two Guys Garage is an American reality television series on automobile repair and customizing, hosted by Bryan Fuller and Sam Memmolo and airing on Speed Channel since 2001. The series is based in Tampa, Florida. The hosts changed in 2012, now hosting the show Kevin Byrd who hosted with Bryan Fuller for several years, along with Willie B. ""Willie B"" also hosts a radio show for ""KBPI"" in Denver, CO, and two seasons on ""PINKS"" on SPEED Channel.

SPEED Channel changed to FOX Sports One in August 2013 and no longer aired how-to automotive programming. The show moved to GAC owned by Scripps. Scripps also owns HGTV, Travel Channel, Food Network, Cook Channel, DIY Network. These how-to networks reach over one million homes across the US.

events.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
events.desc: Cette série captivante met en vedette des couples dévorés par une passion qui leur a fait perdre la raison et poussés à commettre des crimes atroces.

trailers.label: Snapped Killer Couples Return | Season 17 | Teaser

events.title: Interview with a Killer
events.desc: In a gripping new Court TV original documentary series, host David Scott (HBO Real Sports, ABC News) ventures inside high-security prisons to delve into the minds of convicted murderers. Through in-depth interviews and direct confrontations, Scott seeks to uncover the motives and mindsets that led these individuals to commit murder. The series offers a rare glimpse into the psychological and emotional factors driving heinous crimes, providing viewers with a chilling yet insightful look at some of the most dangerous criminals behind bars.

trailers.label: NEW! "Interview With a Killer" Exclusive | A Court TV Original Series

events.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
events.desc: Following the Department of Homeland Security Customs and Border Protection agency as they operate on the 28 bridges connecting the United States of America and Mexico.

events.title: Life on Earth
events.desc: L'histoire de la vie, des premières cellules primitives aux plantes et aux animaux qui vivent aujourd'hui autour de nous.

trailers.label: Sir David Attenborough - The story behind Life on Earth - BBC

events.title: Anderson Cooper 360°
events.desc: Anderson Cooper goes beyond the headlines to tell stories from many points of view, so you can make up your own mind about the news.

events.title: For My Man
events.desc: A true crime series featuring the salacious and shocking stories of women who have been arrested for a crime they did in the name of love. From a killing spree across the mid-west to being an inside informant at the DEA and from murdering an unsupportive mother to robbing fifteen banks in under a year, these women have no limits as to how far they’ll go for their men.

trailers.label: Blood Is Thicker Than Water | For My Man
Bullets on Bourbon Street | For My Man
A Deadly Teenage Mistake | For My Man
Young and Deadly Love | For My Man

events.title: Great Korean Railway Journeys
events.desc: Travelling by rail across South Korea, Michael explores one of the world’s most successful modern nations, shaped by division, resilience and rapid change.

events.title: Only Child
events.desc: Richard's long overdue visit to recently-widowed Ken makes him realize his dad may need a bit more full time help. Not that Ken would agree, of course, but that statement is pretty much true about anything. An eccentric, strong-willed technophobe, Ken is set in his ways, leaving Richard worrying about his dad growing old.

events.title: Scam Interceptors
events.desc: Rav Wilding is hunting down the scammers plaguing our lives. Working with ethical hackers to hack into the fraudsters' illegal call centres, Rav uses cutting-edge technology to monitor the scammers' phone calls in an effort to stop victims losing out to real-time scams.

events.title: Escape to Florida
events.desc: The fun-filled lives of the growing number of British and Irish expats who are turning their backs on grey skies and rising living costs at home and seeking a fresh start in America's Sunshine State.

events.title: Our Tiny Islands
events.desc: From exceptional enclaves and secluded sanctuaries to awe-inspiring archipelagos and hidden havens, what is it like to live on one of the UK's 6000 teeny-tiny islands?

events.title: Number One Fan
events.desc: TV host Lucy is saved from an attack by fan Donna. Lucy invites her to a show taping, but Donna's subsequent behavior becomes increasingly obsessive and concerning.

events.title: Celebs Go Dating
events.desc: Single celebrities join an exclusive dating agency in a bid to find true love. Matchmakers pair them with non-celebrity partners and the cameras capture every romantic and cringe-filled moment.

events.title: Knut: The Viking Emperor
events.desc: Seeking to avenge his father, Knut the Great defied all expectations to rise to power. Through cunning attacks, fierce battles, and strategic alliances, he conquered England, Norway, Sweden, and Denmark. He forged an unprecedented union between Nordic and Anglo-Saxon lands, establishing a maritime empire that stretched from the North Sea to the Atlantic Ocean, via the Baltic Sea. This success allowed him to secure lasting political and cultural control over Northern Europe, becoming the ruler of the largest empire ever created by the Vikings. A story of war, blood, and power, Knut: The Viking Emperor dives into the life of a military genius whose thirst for glory left an indelible mark on the history of Europe, brought to life through fully AI-generated reconstructions in collaboration wit

events.title: Have You Been Paying Attention?
events.desc: Topical comedy-quiz show featuring five guests competing to see who can remember the most about events of the week. A fast-paced, funny look at international affairs, politics, sport and entertainment news, we test just how well our contestants have been paying attention.

events.title: Bêêêêtective Privé
events.desc: George est un berger qui lit chaque soir des romans policiers à ses chères brebis, persuadé qu’elles ne peuvent pas les comprendre. Mais lorsqu’un mystérieux incident vient bouleverser la vie à la ferme, les moutons comprennent qu’ils doivent devenir détectives. En suivant les indices et en enquêtant sur des suspects humains, ils prouvent que même des moutons peuvent s'avérer être de brillants individus capables de résoudre des énigmes criminelles.

events.title: Homestead Rescue
events.desc: Marty Raney et sa famille sont des spécialistes de la vie en autarcie. Ils interviennent aux quatre coins des États-Unis pour enseigner les rudiments de la vie loin de la civilisation à ceux qui aspirent à l’autosuffisance.

events.title: Soccer's American Dream
events.desc: How the gamble that brought professional soccer to America almost didn't pay off.

events.title: This Is a Bomb: The Nevada Casino Heist
events.desc: En 1980, une énorme bombe a été lancée dans le Harvey's Resort Hotel and Casino avec une demande de rançon de 3 millions de dollars. Alors que le FBI s'empresse de le désarmer et de trouver les coupables, rien ne se passe comme prévu.

events.title: Reuben: Life in the Dales
events.desc: Documentary focusing on Reuben Owen from Our Yorkshire Farm, attempting to grow his new heavy plant machinery business with his best friends Tommy and Sarah in the Yorkshire Dales.

events.title: Jamie's Ultimate BBQ
events.desc: Fresh air, good vibes, and woodsmoked wonders! Jamie Oliver shows us how to get outside, get cooking and get those flavours and textures that the kitchen just can’t match.

events.title: Amandaland
events.desc: Post her divorce, Amanda has had to downsize and up sticks to South Harlesden, or as the Estate Agent calls it SoHa (definitely not the area around Wormwood Scrubs prison). With both Manus and Georgie now at secondary school, Amanda has to try and get her head around raising teenagers, dealing with modern motherhood horrors like teenage drinking, fake Instagram accounts and eco anxiety. Spin off from Motherland.

events.title: Iolo's River Valleys
events.desc: Iolo Williams explores four of Wales’s most stunning river valleys from sea to source, uncovering their hidden wonders and remarkable wildlife.

events.title: Jamie Johnson FC
events.desc: Welcome to the Hawx United Academy, where young footballers’ dreams come true - or get crushed. As talented new hopefuls enter the Academy, who has what it takes to make it?

events.desc: No floorboard is left unturned as dynamic property experts Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help house-hunters find the perfect home in the perfect location.

events.desc: Documentary series going beyond the theatre doors of Queen Elizabeth Hospital Birmingham, where surgeons push medical boundaries to the limits.

trailers.label: Surgeons: At the Edge of Life | Trailer - BBC Two

events.title: My Dearest Assassin
events.desc: Traquée pour la rareté de son groupe sanguin, une femme trouve refuge dans les bras d'un assassin impitoyable, dont elle tombe amoureuse. Ensemble, ils luttent pour survivre.

events.title: Bienvenue à Kingston-Falls
events.desc: À Kingston-Falls, l’inspecteur Gabriel Serpent voit ses vacances interrompues par la découverte d’un cadavre dans une position bizarre : des fesses dépassant du sol avec une roue de vélo enfoncée dedans. Son poste de police municipal étant menacé de fermeture, Gabriel veut mener l’enquête pour prouver sa nécessité. L’arrivée de Cynthia Quinn, surnommée « le chien pisteur », enquêtrice aux méthodes douteuses et aux problèmes d’alcool, bouleverse l’harmonie de l’équipe.

events.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation
events.desc: Après avoir fait la fête à Vegas, la bande se rend à Atlantic City pour y passer un séjour estival prolongé sur la côte tout en se remémorant leurs plus belles anecdotes.

trailers.label: 'Jersey Shore: Family Vacation' Official Trailer | Premieres April 5th + 8/7c | MTV

events.title: Jupiter Jones
events.desc: A spin-off of ALLBLK's popular original series A House Divided, following fan-favorite Jupiter Jones - a sharp-witted lawyer tackling high-profile scandals and conspiracies while battling a haunted past. A thrilling mix of legal drama, betrayal, and redemption.

events.title: Classic Movies: The Story of...
events.desc: Movie critic Ian Nathan goes in search of the cinematically sublime and explores the ingredients that went into making a classic. With each episode devoted to a single film, their story will be told with detail, affection, looking for the truth behind the myth, and all the trials and triumphs that went into forging the classic.

events.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
events.desc:
The new series, Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics, will follow the journey of a vehicle purchased at a Mathewsons classic car auction, before being repaired, restored and then re-auctioned in order to try and find the vehicle a new home and loving owner.

The first series started on Thursday 21 July 2022 and will see vehicles such as a 1980s Vauxhall Astra GTE whose hot hatch days look long behind it, a MG Montego Turbo with its engine in the boot, and a rare Lotus Elan S1 that hasn't seen a road for 47 years. The team also revisit some old favourites from previous series of Bangers & Cash.

events.title: Taskmaster
events.desc: Greg Davies est le Taskmaster, et avec l'aide de son assistant toujours fidèle Alex Horne, ils entreprendront de tester les ruses, l'esprit, la sagesse et les compétences de cinq comédiens hyper-compétitifs. Qui sera couronné champion Taskmaster dans ce tout nouveau jeu télévisé ?

events.title: Iron Maiden: Burning Ambition
events.desc: Couvrant cinq décennies, Iron Maiden: Burning Ambition retrace leur ascension emblématique pour devenir l'un des plus grands groupes de l'histoire de la musique.

trailers.label: Exclusively in theaters May 7 for a limited time only!
Krishnavataram Part 1: The Heart (Hridayam) | Official Trailer

events.title: The Last Captains
events.desc: *The Last Captains* is a gripping documentary series immersing viewers in the remote archipelago of the Gulf of St. Lawrence. It chronicles the lives of multi-generational fishing families as they wage a two-front war for survival. On the volatile North Atlantic, they undertake perilous voyages chasing the big catches that sustain their community. Back on shore, the 400 residents battle coastal erosion, economic pressures, and depopulation in a relentless fight to preserve their unique heritage against the forces of nature and time. A stunning, sobering portrait of resilience.

events.title: Deadliest Catch
events.desc: Si vous avez toujours rêvé d'aller pêcher des crabes en Alaska (c'est tout de même assez peu probable), "Péril en haute mer" (Deadliest Catch) devrait vous en décourager... Deadliest Catch est un documentaire diffusé sur Discovery Chanel sur les pêcheurs de crabes (King crab) dans la Mer de Bering en Alaska. Cette pêche ne dure que quelques jours dans des conditions extrêmes : mer déchaînée, icebergs, froid, et erreurs humaines mortelles. Chaque année de nombreux pêcheurs périssent durant cette pêche, y compris durant le tournage...

events.title: Great Performances
events.desc: The best in the performing arts from across America and around the world including a diverse programming portfolio of classical music, opera, popular song, musical theater, dance, drama, and performance documentaries.

events.title: Giro d'Italia Highlights
events.desc: Daily highlights of Giro d'Italia on Quest every day at 10pm. Giro d'Italia is one of the most important races for a cyclist, and will see elite athletes from all over the world competing, and for the first time Quest will be showing action-packed highlights from each day's racing. The race will include six sprint stages, eight stages of medium difficulty climbing, five highly testing climbing stages and two individual time trials (for a total of 67.2km) including the stage that will close the 100th Giro, from the famous Monza racetrack to the Milan Cathedral.

events.title: Mortal Kombat II
events.desc: Les champions plébiscités par les fans – désormais secondés par Johnny Cage en personne – s’affrontent dans un tournoi ultime, sans foi ni loi, pour tenter de renverser le règne de Shao Kahn, un tyran qui menace l’existence même de l’Earthrealm et de ses partisans.

events.title: Billie Eilish - Hit Me Hard and Soft : The Tour (3D)
events.desc: Réalisé pendant sa tournée mondiale jouée à guichets fermés, BILLIE EILISH – HIT ME HARD AND SOFT TOUR (3D) propose une nouvelle expérience de concert innovante sur grand écran, avec l’une des artistes les plus célèbres et les plus talentueuses de sa génération. Présenté en 3D immersive, le film est réalisé par James Cameron et Billie Eilish, tous deux lauréats d’un Oscar.

events.title: Sk+te'kmujue'katik

events.title: De si remarquables créatures
events.desc: Tova, une veuve âgée, se lie d'une amitié improbable avec Marcellus, une pieuvre géante et pacifique qui vit dans l'aquarium où elle travaille. Sans que Tova le sache, Marcellus s'est donné pour mission de résoudre un mystère qui guérira le cœur de la veuve et la mènera à une découverte qui changera sa vie. Basé sur le livre à succès.

events.title: Ready Jet Cook
events.desc: Jet Tila shares his favorite go-to recipes and shops at his family's grocery store.

events.title: Angela Rippon's River Cruises
events.desc: This series showcases the majesty, culture and beauty of the world's most iconic rivers. Presented by journalist and national treasure Angela Rippon, each episode transports viewers along a mighty river through bustling towns, breathtaking vistas and a fascinating journey through history.

events.title: 90 Day Fiancé
events.desc: "90 jours pour se marier" est une émission qui nous offre une fenêtre sur le monde des relations amoureuses internationales. Munies d'un visa de 90 jours, quatre femmes se rendent aux États-Unis afin de vivre enfin avec leur fiancé qu'elles devront épouser avant la fin de leur permis de séjour ou alors, il leur faudra quitter immédiatement le pays.

trailers.label: Meet the Cast of 90 Day Fiancé: Season 6

events.title: Home Town: Inn This Together
events.desc: Ben and Erin help their closest friends take on Laurel's biggest project yet, turning a crumbling 1930s department store into its first luxury boutique hotel. With major risks at play, failure could set the town - and the friends - back for years.

events.title: Naked and Afraid: Global Showdown
events.desc: Survivalists from all over the world - including Brazil, Australia, Mexico, and the United States - represent their homelands in a grueling 40-day primitive bushcraft competition. Paired with a partner, their skills, toughness and teamwork will be tested as they compete for national pride and the largest cash prize in franchise history.

events.title: 90 Day Diaries
events.desc: An intimate look into the lives of our couples, told from their perspective. Without producers or crew, the cast members film themselves in their day-to-day lives as they continue to navigate the COVID-19 pandemic and all of the new challenges it brings to their relationships.

events.title: Believe Me
events.desc: The horrific true story of John Worboys, one of the most notorious serial rapists in British history. His modus operandi was to tell women in his cab that he’d won some money and then persistently offer them a glass of champagne, which he’d laced with drugs, and which rendered his victims unconscious. He was convicted in 2009 for sexually assaulting 12 women between 2006 and 2008, with their cases selected from a large number of suspected further victims.

events.title: The British Academy Television Awards
events.desc: The British Academy Television Awards are presented in an annual award show hosted by the British Academy of Film and Television Arts (BAFTA). They have been awarded annually since 1998, before this period they were awarded during the same ceremony as the BAFTA film awards.

events.title: Trading Places
events.desc: Follow groups of three young people per episode as they are taken out of their existing lives and plunged into a week-long, 24/7 experience inside one of four extraordinary and revealing worlds – worlds with clear expectations of behaviour, exacting standards and a way of life radically different from their own.

events.title: Regular Show: The Lost Tapes
events.desc: Mordecai, un geai bleu, et Rigby, un raton laveur, deux amis paresseux, travaillent dans un parc municipal. Mais, quoi qu'ils entreprennent, leurs tâches quotidiennes finissent invariablement par basculer dans un chaos totalement surréaliste, au grand désespoir de leur patron et de leurs collègues...

events.title: BBQ Brawl
events.desc: Bobby Flay and his chef friends mentor the country's most-respected barbecue pitmasters in an intense competition. At stake is the title of Master of 'Cue and the opportunity to be featured in a new series on Food Network digital.

events.title: Great Central Asian Railway Journeys
events.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on a new railway adventure, following the Silk Road through Central Asia.

events.title: Froglets
events.desc: For the Froglets, the human world is a giant playground full of everyday challenges and wonders that spark an urge to adapt, get creative, play and have lots of fun along the way.

events.title: Major Crimes Unit
events.desc: With unprecedented access to West Midlands Police’s elite crime-fighting unit, this series follows investigators as they race against time to track suspects, uncover the truth, and deliver justice for victims and their families.

events.title: Le Virtuose

events.desc: Cette série documentaire suit l'équipe nationale américaine pendant les quatre années précédant la Coupe du monde 2026 en Amérique du Nord.

events.title: Chopped Castaways
events.desc: Battling the elements across two grueling cooking rounds each week, competitors must build a working kitchen from basic supplies, earn their signature Chopped ingredient baskets through intense physical challenges, and cook entirely over open fire.

events.title: Neighborhood Wars
events.desc: With a record number of Americans trading city life for homes in the suburbs, relationships between neighbors are being put to the test. “Neighborhood Wars” takes viewers into the homes and backyards of neighbors across the country with some of the most unexpected and emotionally charged events caught on camera. Featuring footage from cell phones, drones, home security cameras and more, the series showcases the kindness and conflict between real-life neighbors throughout the US.

events.title: Squatters
events.desc: Self-styled “Squatter Hunter” Flash Shelton crisscrosses the country deploying savvy legal maneuvers — and a whole lot of nerve — to help desperate homeowners reclaim properties seized by unwelcome occupants.

trailers.label: “SQUATTERS” TV Show Intro Clip on A&E

events.title: The Way Out
events.desc: Mel Giedroyc drops two teams of comedians into a bespoke, themed escape room with one simple instruction: the winner is the first team to find ‘the way out’. What lies inside each room remains a complete mystery to the teams until the moment the race begins.

events.title: Critical Condition
events.desc: Jon Ronson investigates the world of critics in this fly-on-the-wall documentary series. In the four episodes he takes a look at comedy, opera, theatre and film.

events.title: Sea Otters: A Wild Family Adventure

events.desc: Alors que Frank Castle cherche un sens à sa vie au-delà de la vengeance, il replonge contre toute attente au cœur du combat.

events.title: Kevin McCloud's Listed Britain
events.desc:
Kevin will travel the length and breadth of the country to uncover the stories behind some of Britain’s most remarkable buildings and structures, exploring why places as diverse as Coventry Cathedral and the Penguin Pool at London Zoo have been judged worthy of the highest level of protection.

This is heritage with the doors thrown open, as Kevin is invited into parts of these structures the public never normally sees, as he meets the people who care for them and gets hands-on himself.

trailers.label: Kevin McCloud's Listed Britain | More 4 Trailer

events.title: Momo 3000
events.desc: « 31 décembre 1999. Seules quelques heures nous séparent du fatidique compte à rebours de l'an 2000 et de son potentiel bogue informatique. Momo sait qu'il n'a besoin que d'une chose pour traverser cette soirée : manger le délicieux couscous. »

events.title: Eruption
events.desc: Contraint de se séparer des souris auxquelles son fils Tim est profondément attaché, Marc agit dans la précipitation, incapable d’annoncer une vérité plus lourde qu’il refuse lui-même d’accepter.

events.title: Off Campus
events.desc: La romance improbable entre Hannah Wells, étudiante en musique ironique qui déteste le hockey, et Garrett Graham, centre vedette et séducteur de l'université Briar, alors qu'ils concluent un accord pour s'entraider. Mais leur accord se déroulera-t-il comme prévu ?

events.title: After the First 48
events.desc: After the First 48 is an American documentary television series on A&E. It is the companion series to The First 48. While the original series deals with the steps taken to discover, locate, and apprehend the person or persons involved in a homicide, After the First 48 continues by shedding light on the judicial aspects of the case including the verdict and sentencing from the trial along with behind the scenes interviews with detectives, prosecutors, defense attorneys and family members of the victim.

events.title: SportsCenter Special
events.desc: SportsCenter Special is a series of talk show special episodes that air throughout the year on different days and at different times with some of the great sportscasters, sports reporters, sports analysts discussing many different sports related topics that are currently in the main topics of the day.

events.title: Welcome to Wrexham
events.desc: Rob McElhenney et Ryan Reynolds sont les nouveaux dirigeants du Wrexham Football Club. Ils tentent de transformer cette équipe en difficulté en un outsider aimé du public. Des paillettes d'Hollywood au Pays de Galles, cette série documentaire suit les déboires de ces propriétaires sans expérience et montre les liens forts qui unissent l'équipe et sa ville.

events.title: Interrogation Raw
events.desc: Criminal cases can be won or lost in the interrogation room. Interrogation Raw is a true crime series that explores fascinating interrogations. Each episode captures the make-or-break moments that occurs within those four walls.

events.title: Killer Investigations
events.desc: Detectives chase down leads, prosecutors go head-to-head with defense attorneys, and juries wrestle with life-or-death decisions.

events.title: The Hardacres
events.desc: The sweeping rags to riches story of the Hardacres, a working-class family in 1890s Yorkshire who strike it rich and move from a grimy fish dock to a vast estate.

events.title: Rookie Truckers
events.desc: It's one of the world's toughest and most dangerous jobs. And as a nationwide driver shortage threatens to stall Australia's economy, a new generation of Rookie Truckers is stepping in to take the wheel. Guiding them through this baptism-by-fire are Yogi, Steve, and Sludge—three long-haul veterans determined to pass on the torch before they hang up their keys.Facing blowouts, breakdowns, and extreme weather on the open road, the Rookie Truckers are pushed to the limit to earn their stripes—and a full-time job. They meet all kinds of colourful characters as they crisscross the continent. And along the way, fine-tune their survival skills, master the art of bush mechanics, and grow into the truckers who will keep Australia moving. Gritty and gripping, it's a high-stakes all-terrain journey packed with rugged landscapes, real drama, and storylines of mentorship and transformation.

events.title: Britain's Countryside Killers
events.desc: A gripping true crime documentary series exploring notorious murder cases that transformed idyllic UK rural landscapes into crime scenes. Each episode features in-depth interviews, revealing the chilling stories behind the tragedies.

events.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
events.desc: Mignon à croquer, tendre et drôle, Bob l'éponge est un personnage pétillant. Vivant au fond de l'océan à Bikini Bottom, Bob l'éponge distille avec le savoir-faire des studios Nickelodeon un second degré de clins d'oeil et de parodies. Retrouvez-le dans ses nouvelles aventures !

events.title: Rock Paper Scissors
events.desc: Pierre, Feuille et Ciseaux, 3 amis inséparables et pourtant querelleurs, partagent leur quotidien et leurs petites misères qui prennent vite des proportions énormes.

events.title: Ring of Honor PPV
events.desc: Ring of Honor Wrestling Entertainment, LLC, known simply as Ring of Honor (ROH), is an American professional wrestling promotion based in Baltimore, Maryland. It is a subsidiary of the Sinclair Broadcast Group (SBG) telecommunication conglomerate.

events.title: The Last Woodsmen
events.desc: Jared Douglas et son équipe de bûcherons risquent leur vie pour abattre des arbres parmi les plus isolés et les plus recherchés de la planète.

events.title: Smoggie Queens
events.desc: Dickie—along with drag queen Mam, self-styled hun Lucinda, awkward Sal, and newcomer Stewart—navigate love, life, and their pride for a town that feels neglected in its own little corner of the UK.

trailers.label: Smoggie Queens Series 2 | Official Trailer - BBC

events.title: Hidden Treasures of the National Trust
events.desc: A look behind the velvet rope at the UK's most beautiful and historic homes with the people saving Britain's priceless heritage.

events.title: Obsession
events.desc: Et si vous pouviez réaliser votre rêve le plus fou ? Un jeune introverti met la main sur un objet magique capable d’exaucer n’importe quel souhait. Son crush de toujours tombe alors raide dingue de lui… jusqu’à l’obsession la plus totale. Faites attention à ce que vous souhaitez !

events.title: Shrek
events.desc: Shrek, un ogre verdâtre, cynique et malicieux, a élu domicile dans un marécage qu’il croit être un havre de paix. Un matin, alors qu’il sort faire sa toilette, il découvre de petites créatures agaçantes qui errent dans son marais. Shrek se rend alors au château du seigneur Lord Farquaad, qui aurait soi‐disant expulsé ces êtres de son royaume. Ce dernier souhaite épouser la princesse Fiona, mais celle‐ci est retenue prisonnière par un abominable dragon. Il lui faut un chevalier assez brave pour secourir la belle. Shrek accepte d’accomplir cette mission. En échange, le seigneur devra débarrasser son marécage de ces créatures envahissantes. Or, la princesse Fiona cache un secret terrifiant qui va entraîner Shrek et son compagnon l’âne dans une palpitante et périlleuse aventure.

events.title: Kairos
events.desc: Après neuf mois de tournage à l’étranger, Manu, un comédien auparavant très en vue, revient à Montréal où il souhaite reprendre son métier. Après plusieurs auditions infructueuses, une remise en question l’amène à saisir au vol un poste d’animateur radio nocturne. Ses auditeurs, principalement des nouveaux arrivants, réfugiés, exilés aux profils variés, occupent eux aussi des emplois de nuit. Manu investit cette tribune de voix métissées en abordant les questions philosophiques qui l’assaillent et voit du même coup sa vie prendre un sens nouveau.

events.title: Dutton Ranch
events.desc: Rip Wheeler et Beth Dutton misent tout sur une nouvelle vie dans le sud du Texas, mais leur rêve de se construire un avenir loin des fantômes de Yellowstone se heurte à de nouvelles réalités et à un ranch rival prêt à tout pour protéger son empire.

events.title: Preakness Stakes
events.desc: The Preakness Stakes is an American thoroughbred horse race held on the third Saturday in May each year at Pimlico Race Course in Baltimore, Maryland. It is a Grade I race run over a distance of 9.5 furlongs (1+3⁄16 miles (1,900 m)) on dirt. Colts and geldings carry 126 pounds (57 kg); fillies 121 pounds (55 kg). It is the second jewel of the Triple Crown, held two weeks after the Kentucky Derby and three weeks before the Belmont Stakes.First run in 1873, the Preakness Stakes was named by a former Maryland governor after the colt who won the first Dinner Party Stakes at Pimlico. The race has been termed "The Run for the Black-Eyed Susans" because a blanket of Maryland's state flower is placed across the withers of the winning colt or filly. Attendance at the Preakness Stakes ranks second i

events.title: The Killer Among Us

events.title: County Rescue

Baddies USA kicks off in DC with a reunion of OG

events.title: Disaster: The Chernobyl Meltdown
events.desc: Cette série, qui présente des interviews révélatrices de survivants s'exprimant publiquement pour la première fois, ainsi que des informations rares sur les réactions de la CIA et des Soviétiques, met au jour un réseau de secrets, d'erreurs de jugement et de pertes humaines. Des images inédites et saisissantes, tournées à l'intérieur de la zone d'exclusion nucléaire, montrent comment ce territoire meurtri est à nouveau assiégé, la guerre s'étendant à l'un des endroits les plus dangereux de la planète.

events.title: In the Eye of the Storm: Chasers

events.title: Death Valley
events.desc: Les exploits d'une unité des forces spéciales de la police de Los Angeles, fondée en 2009 lorsque la vallée de San Fernando a été envahie par des zombies, des vampires et des loups-garous. Alors que les scientifiques cherchent encore une réponse à la cause de ce chaos, les membres de cette équipe d'intervention sont chargés d'éradiquer les monstres, ou du moins les contenir dans la vallée.

events.title: Zog
events.desc: Take to the skies with Zog, the lovable dragon, Doctor Princess Pearl and Sir Gadabout the Great. Join the crew as they soar across the land, treating all their fantastical friends. Based on the award-winning films 'Zog' and 'Zog and the Flying Doctors' and books by Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler, Magic Light Pictures presents an animated comedy adventure series for 4-6 year olds about caring for yourself, for others and for the weird and wonderful world around you.

events.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
events.desc: Master dog trainer Graeme Hall finds long-lasting solutions for dogs with issues.

events.title: Engineering by Catastrophe
events.desc: Engineering by Catastrophe explores how today’s most advanced structures are shaped by the disasters of the past. From spacecraft and skyscrapers to tunnels and flood barriers, each episode unpacks the engineering innovations behind modern marvels - and the catastrophic failures that inspired them.

events.title: RHS Chelsea Flower Show
events.desc:
The RHS Chelsea Flower Show, formally known as the Great Spring Show, is a garden show held for five days in May by the Royal Horticultural Society (RHS) in the grounds of the Royal Hospital Chelsea in Chelsea, London. Held at Chelsea since 1912, it is the most famous flower and landscape gardens show in the United Kingdom, and perhaps in the world. The show is attended by members of the British Royal Family and attracts visitors from all continents.

Highlights to the Chelsea Flower Show include the avant-garde show gardens designed by leading names with Floral Marquee at the centrepiece. The Show also features smaller gardens such as the Artisan and Urban Gardens.

events.title: Later... with Jools Holland
events.desc: Later... with Jools Holland is a contemporary British music television show hosted by Jools Holland.

events.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
events.desc: Michael Portillo travels on the great train routes of Europe, as he retraces the journeys featured in George Bradshaw's 1913 Continental Railway Guide.

events.title: Carl Frampton - On Probation
events.desc: The Probation Board for Northern Ireland is involved at all stages of the criminal justice process - working in courts, the community, in prisons and directly with victims of crime. Television cameras have been given access to its work for the first time and the result is a new documentary series, Carl Frampton: On Probation.In each episode Carl goes behind-the-scenes at every level of probation, shadowing Probation Officers as they work to prevent people reoffending and meeting Service Users with a history of offences, to check in on their progress.As Carl explains, he grew up in a part of Belfast where it would have been easy for his life to have taken a wrong turn, but boxing took him in a different direction. He reflects on how peoples' traumatic experiences at home or when growing up

events.title: Canal Boat Diaries
events.desc: Travelling through England’s landscapes, towns and villages, Robbie Cumming offers a personal take on life aboard his narrowboat the Naughty Lass.

events.title: L'Été 36
events.desc: Été 1936, Nice. Effarée, la bourgeoisie en villégiature, habituée à la Côte d’Azur et à ses privilèges raffinés, voit débouler de nouveaux vacanciers, profitant des premiers congés payés. Dans cette effervescence où deux mondes se côtoient sans chercher à se comprendre, quatre femmes de milieux différents vont se retrouver mêlées à un meurtre dans le très chic hôtel Riviera. Un crime qui va bouleverser leur vie de famille, amoureuse et professionnelle.

events.title: Power Ballad

events.title: The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch
events.desc:
Alors que la plupart des gens se tournent vers les étoiles pour trouver une vie extraterrestre, un groupe de chercheurs fait le contraire : ils cherchent sous terre. Depuis plus de 200 ans, le ranch Skinwalker de l'Utah a été le témoin de centaines d'activités paranormales et d'ovnis.

Malgré des décennies d'études, dont certaines sont secrètement financées par le gouvernement américain, personne n'a osé chercher dans les sols. Aujourd'hui, le légendaire ranch donne un accès complet à une équipe qui se prépare à faire ce qui n'a jamais été fait auparavant.

events.title: Baylen Out Loud

Les résistants s'organisent pour combattre les forces ennemies. Tom Mason, un ancien professeur d'histoire, se retrouve propulsé en tant que commandant en second du 2ème Régiment du Massachusetts. Si le but des survivants est d'essayer de subsister, certains d'entre eux vont également essayer de comprendre la raison de cette invasion.

events.desc: Professional car salvagers Mike Elliot and his crew venture into the harsh Australian Outback to hunt down abandoned vehicles and hidden automotive treasures. Facing treacherous desert terrains and unpredictable elements, the team strips down wrecked cars to export valuable components and turn a profit.

As we explore the blurred lines between Hollywood, politics, and organized crime, the series speculates on whether Monroe knew too much and whether her death was more than a tragic overdose.

L’absence d’eau, cette ressource si précieuse, va faire éclater des vérités longtemps tues et entrainer des déchirements au sein de cette famille.

events.title: Indianapolis 500
events.desc: The Indianapolis 500, formally known as the Indianapolis 500-Mile Race, and commonly called the Indy 500, is an annual automobile race held at Indianapolis Motor Speedway (IMS) in Speedway, Indiana, United States, an enclave suburb of Indianapolis. The event is traditionally held over Memorial Day weekend, usually the last weekend of May. It is contested as part of the IndyCar Series, the top level of American open-wheel car racing, a formula colloquially known as "Indy car racing". The track itself is nicknamed the "Brickyard", as the racing surface was paved in brick in the fall of 1909. One yard of brick remains exposed at the start/finish line. The event, billed as The Greatest Spectacle in Racing, is considered part of the Triple Crown of Motorsport along with the 24 Hours of Le Mans

events.title: National Memorial Day Concert
events.desc: The event has become an American tradition, honoring the military service and sacrifice of all our men and women in uniform, their families at home, and those who have made the ultimate sacrifice for our country.

events.title: WWE Rivals
events.desc: L'acteur et ancien écrivain de la WWE Freddie Prinze Jr. dirige une table ronde sur les sommités de la WWE pour se plonger dans les scénarios et les personnages dynamiques derrière les batailles épiques qui ont construit la WWE Chaque épisode d'une heure présente des images d'archives de la bibliothèque de la WWE ainsi que des interviews avec les légendes impliqués et les Superstars qui ont vu ces rivalités se dérouler.

Ancien joueur marqué par ses propres échecs, Southgate sait qu’il doit affronter les fantômes du passé pour briser une longue série d’échecs. Dans une nation qui a accumulé les désillusions, il tente l’impossible : réconcilier l’Angleterre avec la victoire.

events.desc: An annual American music awards show. Unlike the Grammys, which are awarded on the basis of votes by members of the Recording Academy, the AMAs are determined by a poll of the public and music buyers.

events.desc: Explores WWII from Germany's invasion of Poland through the atomic age, examining pivotal battles, wartime leaders like Churchill and Roosevelt, and the human cost of total war.

trailers.label: World War II with Tom Hanks | Trailer 3
World War II with Tom Hanks | A New Series by The HISTORY Channel

events.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
events.desc: The border between the USA and Mexico is the busiest in the world. This series follows the work of America's Customs and Border Protection agency, whose job is to defend the border and stop terrorists, drugs and illegal weapons from entering the country.

events.title: Mean Girl Murders
events.desc: Découvrez les méandres du fonctionnement des relations féminines et de la rivalité qui les oppose parfois. Comment ces dynamiques peuvent-elles mener à des actes de violence ?

trailers.label: Mean Girl Murders | Official Trailer | ID

events.title: Food Network's Top 10
events.desc: With opinions everywhere about where to find the best bites, Food Network cuts through the noise with Food Network's Top 10 - a new series delivering definitive, crave-worthy rankings of the can't miss dishes across America. Award-winning chefs break down the bites that are truly worth the hype, the splurge, and even a road trip, with the rankings driven by firsthand experience, expertise, and passionate debate about what makes a truly great dish. Each episode counts down the Top 10 in a craveable category - from Brunch and BBQ to Burgers and Pizza - serving up expert insight, insider intel, saucy secrets, and plenty of hot takes along the way.

events.title: Natalie Cassidy: Caring Together
events.desc: Natalie Cassidy returns to college to retrain in care, balancing family and work while discovering purpose through people, compassion and life’s toughest moments.

events.title: Tipping Point
events.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three celebrities take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning 20,000 pounds for charity.

events.title: The Next Step: Cheer
events.desc: Kenzie takes on a bold new challenge – leading a struggling cheerleading squad with big dreams of making it to Nationals. Determined to prove she’s more than just a dancer, Kenzie must rally a mismatched team of athletes, overcome rivalries, and inspire belief in themselves and each other.

events.title: Springwatch
events.desc: Springwatch is an annual BBC television series which charts the fortunes of British wildlife during the changing of the seasons in the United Kingdom.

events.title: Blind Gekocht
events.desc: In Blind Gekocht six families entrust their life savings to the group of experts, which will choose, purchase and renovate a house for them. With one small twist – the new owners get to see the house only after the experts already bought it.

events.title: Castle Impossible
events.desc: With passion, determination and grit, Daphne and Ian will confront budget constraints, battle bug infestations, hunt for rumored hidden treasure and tackle a seemingly endless list of projects head-on to breathe new life into the historic estate and preserve her grandfather's legacy.

events.title: The Many Lives of Benjaman Kyle
events.desc: Retrouvé en sang derrière un Burger King en 2004, « Benjaman Kyle » dit ne se souvenir de rien. Mais cette amnésie rétrograde est-elle bien réelle ?

events.title: Reported Missing
events.desc: Every two minutes someone in Britain goes missing. Multiple cameras follow the hunt for missing people, from the police tasked with finding them to loved ones left at home.

events.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
events.desc: Teams of professional pastry chefs do battle in the kitchen.

events.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
events.desc: A British genealogy documentary series in which celebrities trace their ancestry, discovering secrets and surprises from their past.

trailers.label: Who Do You Think You Are? | BBC Trailers

events.title: Soccer Aid
events.desc: Soccer Aid is a biennial British charity event that has raised £6.5 million in aid of UNICEF UK through ticket sales and donations. The event is a football match between two teams of celebrities and former professional players, representing England and the Rest of the World. Television coverage began on ITV on 22 May 2006 in a show presented by Ant & Dec. Soccer Aid was initiated by Robbie Williams and Jonathan Wilkes. The event returned on 7 September 2008 and again on 6 June 2010. England beat Rest of the World in 2012.

events.title: Entre Deux Silences
events.desc: Court Métrage pour le cours de cinema de St Gelais a lacademie de roberval

events.title: Brilliant Minds
events.desc: Le Dr Oliver Wolf, un éminent neurologue, et son équipe d’internes n'ont de cesse d'explorer l’esprit humain, tout en essayant de gérer leurs relations et de maintenir leur santé mentale.

trailers.label: Brilliant Minds (NBC) Trailer HD - Zachary Quinto medical drama

events.title: Scripps National Spelling Bee
events.desc: On Scripps National Spelling Bee students prepare for local spelling bees using a variety of materials provided by us and Merriam-Webster, and they advance to the Scripps National Spelling Bee near Washington, D.C., by winning a series of spellings as outlined by their local spelling bee sponsors. In general terms, the program is open to students who have neither turned 16 nor passed beyond the eighth grade, and who attend schools that officially enrolled with our program for the current academic year.

events.title: The Rise and Fall of the Roman Empire
events.desc: Detailing the rise and fall of the Roman Empire, I, Caesar takes a fascinating look at the public and private lives of six key men who ruled ancient Rome: Julius Caesar, Augustus, Nero, Hadrian, Constantine and Justinian. Their careers were made up of bloody battles and tactical bribery, stunning innovation and profound corruption, dazzling rhetoric and vicious back-stabbing – and together they form a picture of the most sophisticated highs and most brutal lows of the Roman Empire’s inception, heyday and decline. Stretching at its peak, from the north of England to southern Egypt and from the west coast of Spain to Syria in the east, the Roman Empire included within its boundaries myriad people, cultures and climates.

events.title: Secrets of the Dead
events.desc: Part detective story, part true-life drama, long-running series explores some of the most iconic moments in history to debunk myths and shed new light on past events. Using the latest investigative techniques, forensic science and historical examination, it shatters accepted wisdom, challenges prevailing ideas, overturns existing hypotheses, spotlights forgotten mysteries, and ultimately rewrites history.

events.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch
events.desc: Il y a des endroits sur terre où la terre semble tout simplement différente, et Blind Frog Ranch dans l'est de l'Utah est l'un de ces endroits. Les habitants disent que la terre est maudite. Qu'il essaie de s'accrocher à quelque chose.

trailers.label: Mystery At Blind Frog Ranch | Season 4 | OFFICIAL Promo Trailer [2024] [SHORT]
Mystery At Blind Frog Ranch Season 1 Recap [2022]

events.title: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder
events.desc: Cinq ans après le meurtre d'une jeune fille de 17 ans dans une petite ville anglaise sans histoire, une lycéenne est déterminée à découvrir la vérité et à trouver le véritable assassin.

trailers.label: Bloodline Detectives hosted by Nancy Grace - Streaming Now

events.title: Make That Movie
events.desc: Make That Movie follows a hotshot director, played by stand-up comedian and actor Sam Campbell, scouring the country for everyday people who have an idea for a feature film. Sam and his team then race against the clock as they attempt to transform the idea into a film in just three days.

trailers.label: TRAILER: Make That Movie | Brand New Comedy | Thurs 28th May | Channel 4

events.title: Cornwall: A Year by the Sea
events.desc: Exploring Cornwall as a thriving county all year round. There may be a bountiful tourism industry, but Cornwall's proud and hard-working locals still farm the land and fish the sea, coming together for traditional celebrations throughout the year.

events.title: George Clarke's Kitchen vs Garden
events.desc: Architect George teams up with garden designer Luke Millard to offer people two design solutions - one for the kitchen and one for the outside - before the homeowners' decide how much of their budget to allocate to each improvement.

events.title: UFO Chronicles
events.desc: UFO Chronicles is an unprecedented and uncensored film series featuring the top authorities on the UFO enigma.

events.title: A Life in Ten Pictures
events.desc: Des destins et des vies extraordinaires racontées aux travers de photos, célèbres ou privées, par ceux qui les ont le mieux connu.

events.title: Backrooms
events.desc: Un jeune cinéaste bascule dans une autre dimension vide et labyrinthique, qui semble abriter des êtres d'un autre monde.

events.title: The Breadwinner
events.desc: Un homme devient père au foyer et réalise rapidement qu'il ne sait plus où donner de la tête.

events.title: Pressure
events.desc: Dans les soixante-douze heures précédant le Jour J, le chef météorologue britannique James Stagg est appelé à fournir les prévisions les plus importantes de l'histoire afin que les Alliés puissent débarquer sur les plages normandes.

trailers.label: PRESSURE – Bande-annonce Officielle VOSTF – Andrew Scott / Brendan Fraser (2026)

events.title: Vol de nuit pour Los Angeles
events.desc: En plein âge d'or de l'aviation, un jeune amateur d'avions et sa mère embarquent pour un périple à travers le pays jusqu'à Hollywood. Ce vol deviendra le voyage d'une vie.

events.title: Star City
events.desc: Dans une réalité alternative dans laquelle l'Union soviétique est la première nation à mettre un pied sur la lune, la course à l'espace est retracée de derrière le rideau de fer, montrant la vie des cosmonautes, des ingénieurs et des officiers du renseignement du programme spatial soviétique, ainsi que les risques que chacun d'eux a pris pour propulser l'humanité vers une nouvelle ère.

events.title: Love After Lockup
events.desc: Cette émission suit des couples qui se sont rencontrés alors qu'un des deux membres était en prison. Alors que la date de sortie approche, ils doivent voir s'ils sont réellement capables de vivre ensemble, en dehors de visites supervisées. Tout est une première fois pour eux : rendez-vous galants, rencontres de la famille, et chicanes. De plus, les ex-détenus doivent composer avec les tentations nouvelles, la transition difficile vers le monde extérieur et le jugement de leurs proches.

events.title: The UnXplained
events.desc: La série "Inexpliqué" s'attaque aux sujets qui ont mystifié l'humanité depuis des siècles, des structures mystérieuses et des villes anciennes maudites aux observations extraterrestres et aux rituels bizarres. La série contiendra également des contributions de scientifiques, d'historiens, d'ingénieurs et de chercheurs de haut niveau - chacun cherchant à faire la lumière sur la façon dont l'impossible peut se produire.

events.title: This Is Poly
events.desc:
We TV and All Reality have revealed the trailer and key art for This Is Poly, a new, unscripted series exploring the real lives of modern polyamorous relationships. The 8-episode series takes a first-of-its-kind look at the world of polyamory, following the lives of five wildly different polycules, interconnected groups of people in polyamorous relationships.

As they build lives and families outside traditional norms, the series dives into the emotional realities of jealousy, commitment, communication, and trust, testing every rule of love and redefining what it means to be a family. This Is Poly premieres Friday, May 29, at 9:30 pm Et/Pt, immediately following the season premiere of Love After Lockup at 8 pm Et/Pt.

events.title: The Chase
events.desc: The Chase isn’t just a quiz… it’s a race, where the players must ensure they stay one step ahead of ‘The Chaser’, a ruthless quiz genius determined to stop them winning at all costs.

events.title: We Baby Bears
events.desc: Les frères et soeurs ours, Grizz, Panda et Polaire voyagent à travers différents mondes à bord de leur boite magique, grâce à un voeu, pour trouver un nouveau foyer.

events.title: Heart & Hustle: Houston

events.title: Craig Ferguson: American on Purpose
events.desc: Craig Ferguson travel coast-to-coast to explore the defining ideas, and contradictions, at the heart of the United States. Guided by his distinct humor and point of view, Ferguson examines the country's founding ideals while reflecting on his own experience becoming an American citizen. Along the way, he visits iconic locations and unexpected corners of the country and encounters a wide range of voices from comedians and entrepreneurs to historians and everyday Americans.

events.title: The Mother of All Cons
events.desc: Charity, celebrity and control. A teenager with a brain tumour starts a children's charity, but doubts arise - is she really ill? The truth is more shocking than anyone imagined.

events.desc: Neighbours Leo and Clive have lived next door for 15 years, and become deadly enemies as the world around them grows more tense, exploring the prejudices creeping into modern life.

events.desc: Les influenceurs renvoient une image de succès, de marques florissantes et de bénéfices records. Mais dans leur vie, la réalité est bien plus sombre.

events.title: Bring Me the Beauties: A Model Cult
events.desc: Follows the Eternal Values cult of the ’80s and ’90s, led by Manhattan socialite Frederick von Mierers.

events.title: 90 Day: The Last Resort Between the Sheets
events.desc: An unfiltered after-show that dives deeper into each episode of 90 Day: The Last Resort (2023). Cast members provide behind-the-scenes commentary and personal reflections on their experiences at the resort. Through never-before-seen footage, and unique therapist interviews, viewers will get an exclusive insider look at what really went down when the cameras were and weren't rolling. This has all the juicy secrets, hilarious anecdotes and emotional moments as your favorite couples dissect jaw dropping scenes.

events.title: Lethally Blonde
events.desc: Host Holly Madison reveals the stories of everyday young women who use sex appeal as an avenue to power, which leads them into a risqué world of jealousy and obsession that quickly becomes darker and more dangerous than they can possibly imagine.

events.desc: We meet those who call the waterways – the UK’s canal network - home. Whether it be retirees looking for freedom, young people searching for an affordable alternative to the cost-of-living crisis, newlyweds, families or divorcees, we’ll be introduced to a new and vibrant community made up of people from all walks of life, ages and backgrounds.

events.title: Forensics: Crash Scene Investigators
events.desc: Forensic collision investigators assess crash scenes using technology and detective work.

events.title: America's Got Talent
events.desc: Un concours de talents hebdomadaire où un éventail d'artistes - des chanteurs et danseurs, aux comédiens et aux numéros de nouveauté - se disputent un prix en espèces d'un million de dollars.

events.desc: Version américaine du concours britannique de dating réalité dans lequel dix célibataires viennent séjourner quelques semaines dans une villa et doivent se mettre en couple. events.title: People Magazine Investigates: Surviving a Serial Killer
events.desc: Très peu de personnes survivent à leur rencontre avec des tueurs en série. Des survivants témoignent et partagent leurs expériences terrifiantes.

events.title: Password
events.desc: Jimmy Fallon and other celebrities pair with contestants to face off in the ultimate game of words.

events.title: Bodies in the Water
events.desc: Haunting real-life mysteries that dive deep into the secrets of murder victims submerged in a watery grave.

events.title: The Proof Is Out There: Unexplained Edition
events.desc: In this special edition series of The Proof Is Out There, journalist Tony Harris explores some of the most astonishing phenomena ever captured on camera. From UFOs and cryptids to eerie encounters and unexplained forces, Tony and a team of experts analyze the evidence and deliver their verdict.

events.desc: Ten pairs of contestants arrive at a Caribbean resort filled with glamour, opulence and deception. Each room has an identical briefcase. Inside one contains £250,000 cash, another contains the dreaded Early Checkout Card, and the rest are empty. Tension builds as each pair must try to uncover who has which case by playing compelling challenges, and as the “Whogotit” mystery ramps up, the couple with the cash must keep their case for eight days to win.

events.desc: An exclusive insight into the extraordinary lives of one of the football and showbiz worlds’ most famous families as they face their biggest challenge yet - leaving Leicester City after 13 years for a new life abroad.

events.title: Hashtag Homicide
events.desc: Series exploring the intersection of social media and true crime, where the virtual world becomes the stage for murder, investigation, justice and prevention.

events.title: Staged: Deadly Deception
events.desc: What seems like a tragic accident or an open and shut case often hides a darker truth. Staged: Deadly Deception uncovers the chilling real-life stories where crime scenes are meticulously staged to disguise unimaginable horrors.Each episode delves into the twisted mind of those who constructed these elaborate deceptions, revealing the devastating toll of their lies on families, communities, and society.Through expert analysis, interviews, and forensic breakthroughs, the series goes behind the scenes of these crimes, piecing together the story as investigators unravel the truth hidden beneath the surface.

events.title: Sara Price: Chasing Dakar
events.desc: After becoming one of the dominant talents in women's motocross, Sara sold her home, drained her savings and risked her financial security to chase the Dakar dream on four wheels.

events.desc: Across the globe and throughout history, ancient civilizations erected structures that continue to inspire awe and wonder. But how did they do it? Archaeological finds and new technologies reveal clues to long-enduring mysteries.

Pour sauver sa famille et son royaume, Adam doit unir ses forces à celles de ses plus proches alliés, Teela (Camila Mendes) et Duncan, alias le Maître d’Armes (Idris Elba), et accepter sa véritable destinée en devenant Musclor — l’homme le plus puissant de l’univers.

events.title: Build Your Dream Home in the Country
events.desc: Builder Mark Millar helps families around Britain who are taking the extraordinary step of building their own dream homes. The dream homes cover a wide range of budgets from as little as £10,000, and all types of homes in beautiful country locations.

events.title: Totally Funny Animals
events.desc: TV show is hosted by comedian Andy Woodhall. Each episode features caught-on-camera videos highlighting the sometimes outrageous and wacky world of animals. The series also includes everything from sneezing cats and calamitous canines to dumpster-diving bears and rascally raccoons. Plus, the host counts down the top ten critter crack-ups of the week.

events.title: Everything on the Menu with Braun Strowman
events.desc: WWE star Braun Strowman travels America, attempting to eat every item on restaurant menus during his WWE tour stops.

events.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
events.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, some of Britain's best loved personalities, turn their hand to being the country's most opinionated viewers, sharing their opinions on what they have been watching during the week.

events.desc: Vingt-six ans après avoir échappé à un tueur masqué étrangement familier, les héros emblématiques de la saga sont de nouveau dans la ligne de mire du meurtrier, et aucune franchise de film d’horreur n’est à l’abri.

trailers.label: Scary Movie | Michael VF [Au cinéma le 3 juin 2026]

events.title: WHO
events.desc: Neuf criminels, chacun unique en son genre, découvrent que l’un d’eux a été arrêté. Une seule explication : le traître est autour de leur table. Leur pacte ne tient plus qu’à un fil. Ils doivent démasquer la balance avant qu’elle ne les fasse tous tomber les uns après les autres. Mais le plus dangereux n’est pas toujours celui qu’on regarde.

events.title: Belmont Stakes
events.desc: The Belmont Stakes is an American Grade I stakes race for three-year-old Thoroughbreds run at Belmont Park in Elmont, New York. Colts and geldings carry a weight of 126 pounds (57 kg); fillies carry 121 pounds (55 kg). The race, nicknamed The Test of the Champion, The Test of Champions and The Run for the Carnations, is the traditional third and final leg of the Triple Crown. It is usually held on the first or second Saturday in June, five weeks after the Kentucky Derby and three weeks after the Preakness Stakes. The 1973 Belmont Stakes and Triple Crown winner Secretariat holds the mile and a half stakes record (which is also a track and world record on dirt) of 2:24.When run at 1+1⁄2 miles, the Belmont Stakes covers one full lap of Belmont Park, known as "The Championship Track" because n

events.title: Fashion Forward
events.desc: Fashion Forward is a weekly series that gives you an inside look into the glamorous world of the most stylish stars. Keep up with the latest news, check out what the most influential models are up to on social media, get to know their beauty secrets and learn how to dress like your favourite celebs.

events.title: Tony Awards
events.desc: The Antoinette Perry Award for Excellence in Theatre, more commonly known as a Tony Award, recognizes achievement in live Broadway theatre. The awards are presented by the American Theatre Wing and The Broadway League at an annual ceremony in New York City. The awards are given for Broadway productions and performances, and an award is given for regional theatre.

events.title: 100 Cooks
events.desc: It is the biggest home cook competition of all time. Actor, television host and former pro football player Terry Crews hosts as 100 of America's elite home cooks enter the stadium kitchen arena where they will be challenged to the most unpredictable, professional-chef level cooking competition ever. As the competition begins, chefs are selected at random to come to the floor to compete while the "Challenge Mixer" dictates the challenges they will face ranging from fast-paced trivia contests to 30-minute do-or-die cooking battles. Top culinary content creator Nick DiGiovanni and chef and NYT best-selling cookbook author Alex Guarnaschelli are the judges that determine who stays and who goes. Each round's winner will be given a chance to take the cash or add it to the ever-growing grand prize pot, which starts at $100,000...so as the number of cooks goes down, the grand prize goes up.

events.title: Tiger Island
events.desc: In Nepal, a team of film-makers and big cat experts begin an expedition following two tiger mothers and their cubs, on an extraordinary island full of potential dangers.

events.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
events.desc: Suivez les membres de l'équipage qui vivent et travaillent à bord d'un méga-yacht de 150 pieds alors qu'il entreprend une saison de charter en Méditerranée. Fournir un service inégalé à des clients fortunés et intransigeants est d'autant plus difficile que l'équipe doit faire face à toutes sortes de situations, depuis les triangles amoureux jusqu'au fait de voir des membres de l'équipage franchir de manière choquante les limites avec les clients.

trailers.label: SNEAK PEEK: Your First Look at Below Deck Mediterranean Season 9 | Bravo

events.title: American Ninja Warrior
events.desc: Des concurrents doivent réussir des épreuves physiques de plus en plus difficiles dans l'espoir de décrocher les grands honneurs.

events.title: Crashers
events.desc: DIY Network is on a mission to crash and trash bathrooms, transforming them into stunning, functional and modern living spaces in the new series Bath Crashers. Produced similarly to the popular House Crashers and Yard Crashers series, crasher Matt Muenster ambushes homeowners while they're home improvement shopping. When he identifies the ultimate bathroom challenge, he follows the lucky homeowner home and totally overhauls a bathroom in need of repair.

events.title: Most Extreme Humans
events.desc: Most Extreme Humans follows people from around the globe living with the world's rarest and most remarkable physical conditions. From a Filipino man whose hands have grown so large he wears wristwatches as rings, to Brazil, where the world's smallest married couple have a combined height under six feet, to a 19-year-old in India living with the ultra-rare condition known as "werewolf syndrome." This series examines what everyday life looks like when the world is not built with your body in mind.

events.title: Guy's Grocery Games
events.desc:
Dans chaque épisode de cette compétition présentée par le célèbre Guy Fieri, une virée dans un supermarché peut rapporter 20 000 $ à un chef ! Quatre cuisiniers s'affrontent au cours de trois manches éliminatoires pour mettre à l'épreuve leurs talents culinaires tout en déambulant dans les rayons d'un supermarché. Chaque épreuve est thématique:

- par exemple, n'utiliser que des produits surgelés et notée par un jury tournant qui élimine un candidat. Celui ou celle qui réussit les trois épreuves dispose alors de deux minutes pour aller chercher différents objets notés sur une liste. Chaque objet valant 2 000 $, en les récupérant tous, le gagnant peut repartir avec la somme de 20 000 $ !

trailers.label: Set Tour | Guy's Grocery Games | Food Network

events.title: Plan B
events.desc: Un jeune avocat ambitieux découvre un moyen de voyager dans le temps pour réparer ses relations et créer sa vie parfaite, mais même s'il sait ce qui va se passer ensuite, il ne peut pas tout contrôler.

events.title: Surviving Earth

events.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan

Il nous embarque dans son quotidien mouvementé, aux côtés d'une mère dealeuse de cocaïne et avec un réseau émergent dans tout New York.

events.title: Amours chiennes
events.desc: Mexico. Un tragique accident de voiture mêle les extrêmes de la vie, sous l'angle de trois histoires radicalement différentes : Octavio, un adolescent qui a décidé de s'enfuir avec la femme de son frère; Daniel, un quadragénaire qui quitte sa femme et ses enfants pour aller vivre avec un top model; El Chivo, un ex-guérillero communiste devenu tueur à gages, qui n'attend plus rien de la vie.
